programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina
programme.desc: This episode includes: Reincarnated Submariner, Wanted Weaver, Smitty, Oliver, A Manpanzee and Caruana.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries
programme.desc: This episode includes: Ice Woman, Airline Employee Murder, Silicon Valley Hit, Florida Crime Spree & UD and Elvis, The Twinless Twin.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries
programme.desc: This episode includes: Padre Pio, Pts. 1 & 2, Model's Third Notebook & UD, Calculating Coroners & UD and Nazi's Lazarus.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries
programme.desc: This episode includes: Dennis Cole's Son, UD: Train Wreck Amnesia, Newsman's Lost Love & UD, Amish Hostage Murder & UD and Plateau Vision.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries
programme.desc: This episode includes: Chad, UD: Thanks Big Brother, Honky Tonk Woman & UD, Practical Joker & UD and Nine Lives & UD.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: A Night at The Leeds Museum Part 1
programme.desc: Four floors of terror! Objects from around the world are at home in the museum, but what is attached to them, which now roams the floors and corridors after dark?

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Lost Souls of One Melling Road
programme.desc: The team heads to Liverpool to help a restaurant uncover what could be haunting there. Bex and Sean encounter the spirit of a white lady in the private quarters.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: A Night at The Leeds Museum Part 2
programme.desc: With activity sending the team into a spin on the top floor, is there something attached to the museum's main attraction, the mummy?

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Full House at Northwich Plaza and Bingo Hall
programme.desc: Bex and Sean head into Northwich, Cheshire to investigate a disused bingo hall. Bex braves a lone vigil, which she will never forget as a door seemingly opens on its own.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Vision of Murder
programme.desc: A quaint New Jersey town is rocked when a local nurse, Betty Cornish, is found bludgeoned to death in her apartment.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: A Psychic for the Defense
programme.desc: Investigators are perplexed when a gagged and mutilated body washes up on a Florida beach. The FBI is called in to help crack the gruesome case.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Till Death Do Us Part
programme.desc: In small town Ohio, a respected state trooper reports his wife missing. Then he tells the police she’s run off with a secret lover. But has she?

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Little Boy Lost
programme.desc: In 1957, nine-year-old Peter Boland was on holiday having the time of his life on a remote farm in New Zealand when he simply vanished without a trace. Peter’s older brother Gavin Boland, a self-confessed sceptic, turns to Sensing Murder’s psychics.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Taken for a Ride
programme.desc: 54 year old Simon Buis was savagely beaten and kicked to death in an Auckland park in 1980 by persons unknown. To this day, his killers have evaded capture.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Taken Out
programme.desc: Was Donovan Reidy deliberately run down and left to die? In 1995, 23-year-old Donovan Reidy was at a party when he got into a fight. A short while later, his bloodied body was found on the side of a major New Zealand highway.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Without Warning
programme.desc: This week’s episode of Sensing Murder promises greater co-operation between psychics and police, attempting to uncover the truth about the death of 18-year-old apprentice plumber Regan O’Donoghue, who was killed in a hit and run in 2007.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Please Sign the Ghostbook
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS stays close to home and investigatesthe Lamda Chi Fraternity House at the University ofRhode Island, where a little girl reportedly fell to her death, and whose eerie presence is still feltin the house.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: A Serial Killer's Revenge
programme.desc: Jason and the TAPS team head to Charleston, South Carolina, one of the most haunted cities in America and winner of Ghost Hunters America's Hometown Ghost Hunt Contest.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Camp Fear
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, Jason and TAPS go to camp! They head to Camp Rutledge in Georgia where a woman has experienced paranormal activity since she was a teenager.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: French Quarter Massacre
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS heads out to New Orleans, Louisiana to investigate their first case without Grant: The Jimani Lounge Massacre.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Don't Feed the Apparition
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS revisits a familiar city, Alexandria, Louisiana, but this time, they're there to investigate the Alexandria Zoo.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Ghostly Refuge
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS heads to Oswego, New York to investigate the renowned Fort Ontario. TAPS has investigated many forts, but never one that once served as a sanctuary for Jewish refugees during World War II.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Drowned
programme.desc: Kim and her family have been frightened out of their seaside Maryland home. Multiple family members have reported sightings of children with purple lips and strange noises emanating from the nearby creek.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Man of the House
programme.desc: PRS is called to help a grandmother and her frightened grandson when renovations on her 19th century house stir up the pipe-smoking specter of a former tenant named Alfred.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Dark Practice
programme.desc: Brenda is terrified by a dark hooded figure spotted in her West Virginia home. The same entity allegedly tormented her late husband. PRS and Psychic/Medium Michelle Belanger help Brenda before she slips into the same abyss as her late husband.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Desperate Households
programme.desc: When Julie and her family moved into their dream home in suburban New Jersey they quickly realized they were not alone.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Dead Legends
programme.desc: PRS and Psychic/Medium Chip Coffey investigate the famed Hotel Conneaut in northern Pennsylvania. Heavy doors opening on their own, sightings of a boy, a bride and a menacing butcher have the hotel's staff on edge.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Smoke and Shadows
programme.desc: Sarah believes her Parkville, MD home has been invaded by a powerful force ever since her roommate Dennis moved in. PRS investigates claims that Dennis has been attacked by the entity, a possible poltergeist.

programme.title: Paranormal State: They Only Come Out at Night
programme.desc: Once night falls in a quaint?New England Town, a police officer's family is terrorized by demons.?PRS arrives just in time with the family ready to vacate their family home, rather than suffer the advances of these spirit creatures.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Devil's Hostage
programme.desc: When a woman has long scratch marks mysteriously appear on her back, PRS is called in to see if they are truly facing the devil. But her credibility is called into question, a struggle of another kind emerges for Ryan and the rest of the team.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Who Is the Lurking Man?
programme.desc: PRS travels to Newcastle, CA to investigate a house with paranormal forces so strong, the family has cleared out. Ryan believes the Native American land may hold the key to the mystery and leads the team in a fight to reclaim a scared family's house.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Knickerbocker
programme.desc: PRS checks into the Knickerbocker Hotel in Linesville, Pennsylvania where the owners are reporting strange noises and the appearance of phantom children in some of the rooms.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Fury
programme.desc: Kathy, her two daughters and her new husband, "Farmer" thought they had the perfect, quiet life deep in the mountains of West Virginia.

programme.title: NEW & EXCLUSIVE! MOST HAUNTED
programme.desc: Yvette and her team continue their investigation into this mysterious place. With something seemingly stalking the crew the night ends with a particularly vigorous spirit in a very small room.

programme.title: Most Haunted: ACCRINGTON COURTS PT1
programme.desc: Yvette Fielding leads Most Haunted to Accrington's old police station and courts, housing playful spirits and malevolent entities. Is the evil too much for the team?

programme.title: Most Haunted: ACCRINGTON COURTS PT2
programme.desc: The second part of Yvette Fielding and the Most Haunted team's investigation at the now-abandoned old police station and courts in Accrington. With the team splitting up to cover as much space as they can, something seems to be stalking them.

programme.title: Most Haunted: ACCRINGTON COURTS PT3
programme.desc: The third and final part of this terrifying and intriguing investigation into the paranormal activity at Accrington’s Old Police Station and Courts.

programme.title: Most Haunted: TOWNELEY HALL Pt1
programme.desc: Yvette Fielding is back with the first part of a brand-new episode of Most Haunted. The intrepid ghost hunter has taken her team to the historic hall, which is said to be haunted by ancestral ghosts, the apparition of a white lady and a demon dog.

programme.title: Beyond Belief: Fact or Fiction: Episode 9
programme.desc: This episode features the following cases: For the Record, Halloween, Precious, Get Your Kicks at Motel 66, Phantom Drifter.

programme.title: Beyond Belief: Fact or Fiction: Episode 6
programme.desc: This episode features the following cases: The Candlestick, The Diner, From the Agency, The Magic Rose Garden, The Jeep.

programme.title: Beyond Belief: Fact or Fiction: Episode 13
programme.desc: This episode features the following cases: The Dealer, Gratuity, The Cake, 1st Time Offender, The Mirror of Truth.

programme.title: Beyond Belief: Fact or Fiction: Episode 4
programme.desc: This episode features the following cases: E-Mail, Cup of Joe, Secret of the Family Tomb, Wheezer, The Unknown Patient.

programme.title: Beyond Belief: Fact or Fiction: Episode 10
programme.desc: This episode features the following cases: Devil's Tattoo, Static Man, The Bloody Hand, Where Have All the Heroes Gone, War Surplus.

programme.title: Escape Plan: Escape Plan
programme.desc: Sylvester Stallone, Arnold Schwarzenegger, and 50 Cent star as inmates who must break out of a top secret, high-security prison in this non-stop action-thriller.

programme.title: The Sentinel
programme.desc: Compromised by his affair with the first lady, a veteran secret service agent is framed as a potential presidential assassin and must rely on a hostile former prot‚g‚ to flush out the real culprit.

programme.title: The Last Witch Hunter
programme.desc: The last witch hunter (Vin Diesel) is all that stands between humanity and the combined forces of the most horrifying witches in history.

programme.title: The Rewrite
programme.desc: A once successful British screenwriter finds himself teaching at a U.S. college where he falls for one of his students who's a single mom.

programme.title: Joe Somebody
programme.desc: Tim Allen is Joe, a guy whose life has been steadily changing for the worse. When the office bully goes too far, Joe decides it's time to turn himself from a nobody into a somebody.

programme.title: Love Potion #9
programme.desc: Paul, a geek biochemist with no luck at all with women, is persuaded by his friends to visit a gypsy. She gives him "Love Potion #9", an elixir which can potentially force anyone of the opposite sex to instantly fall in love with him.

programme.title: Satan's School for Girls
programme.desc: A made-for-TV occult horror classic.

programme.title: The Lair Of The White Worm
programme.desc: After a mysterious skull is unearthed, it's stolen and used by its new owner to worship a pagan god who hungers for the taste of virginal flesh in this cheeky horror-comedy.

programme.title: Amityville II: The Possession
programme.desc: A prequel to "THE AMITYVILLE HORROR" This chronicles the Long Island house's early years as a haven for demonic forces intent on driving a father to beat the kids, a mother to prayer and a brother to lust after his sister. Before he murders them all!

programme.title: China 9, Liberty 37
programme.desc: A condemned man, Clayton, is released on the condition that he kills a rancher for the railway company. He can't do it, but when the man's wife believes she has killed him, she runs away with Clayton. The husband, not dead, follows them.

programme.title: Outlaws
programme.desc: In this exhilarating action epic an impassioned group of men and women make the decision to risk it all for family, faith and country. Outlaws reveals the once hidden true story of the 1920's Cristeros War. What price would you pay for freedom?

programme.title: Red Sun: Red Sun
programme.desc: In 1870, a gang robs a train and steals a ceremonial Japanese sword meant as a gift for the U.S. President, prompting a manhunt to retrieve it.

programme.title: Black Eagle
programme.desc: One of the US Air Force’s most modern tactical aircrafts, a F-100 with a new laser guidance system, crashes in the sea near Malta.The CIA dispatches their best agent to salvage the system before it falls into enemy hands.

programme.title: War (2007)
programme.desc: A full-throttle, martial arts thriller, WAR stars Jet Li and Jason Statham as two adversaries set on a violent collision course in the Asian mob underground.

programme.title: New Fist of Fury
programme.desc: A stylish remake of Bruce Lee's original Fist of Fury from the same director (Lo Wei), ‘New Fist of Fury’ was a vital landmark in the early career of the legendary Jackie Chan.

programme.title: Bug
programme.desc: An unhinged war veteran holes up with a lonely woman in a spooky Oklahoma motel room. The line between reality and delusion is blurred as they discover a bug infestation. Starring: Ashley Judd, Michael Shannon, Harry Connick Jr., Lynn Collins

programme.title: Insomnia
programme.desc: Academy Award winners Robin Williams, Al Pacino and Hilary Swank star in a thriller set in the land of the midnight sun, where the mind of even a tough cop can be threatened by Insomnia.

programme.title: A Thousand Kisses Deep
programme.desc: An unsettling drama that cinematically captures and recreates the psycho-analytic experience. Starring: Jodie Whittaker, Emilia Fox, Dougray Scott

programme.title: Pod
programme.desc: A family intervention goes horrifically awry within the snowy confines of an isolated lake house.

programme.title: Incoming
programme.desc: The International Space Station is now a prison - the ultimate black site. But when the imprisoned terrorists take over the Station and turn it into a missile aimed at Moscow, only a shuttle pilot and a rookie doctor can stop them.

programme.title: Project Ithaca
programme.desc: A group of strangers awaken aboard an alien spacecraft, which is harnessing their terror to power the ship. Divided they will die. Together, they can find a way home.

programme.title: Robot Riot
programme.desc: A group of soldiers are dropped into an abandoned town with no memory of who or where they are only to discover that they are being used as "test subjects" for a new group of giant "battle robots" being controlled by an insane army general.

programme.title: My Brother the Pig
programme.desc: Being a teen is tough enough for Kathy Cauldwell without having to be the target of her little brother George's jokes. Then their parents leave for France and George is magically transformed into a pig via some of their nanny Matilda's ancient rocks.

programme.title: A Fairy Tale After All
programme.desc: A teenage girl is transported into a world of fantasy and fairy tales while at a school marionette show. She realizes her own imagination has an adventure already scripted for her that carries more wisdom than she could ever find in the real world.

programme.title: Ratchet and Clank
programme.desc: When the galaxy comes under the threat of a nefarious space captain, a mechanic and his newfound robot ally join an elite squad of combatants to save the universe.

programme.title: Secrets In The Ice: Russia's Mountain Mummy Enigma
programme.desc: Russian soldiers make a grim discovery on a mountain. An abandoned town has an unusual past. Scientists working in Antarctica find something surprising beneath the ice. In Greenland, strange depressions in the ground are investigated.

programme.title: Secrets In The Ice: Riddle Of Whale Bone Alley
programme.desc: Merging CGI recreations, advanced scanning technology and scientific research, this series journeys to the planet’s most remote, cold and inhospitable places to reveal great mysteries that were once frozen in time.

programme.title: Secrets In The Ice: Ancient Ice Zombies
programme.desc: Thirty World War II aircraft all crashed in the same spot on the Greenland Ice sheet, causing experts to wonder if they all fell victim to the Arctic’s Bermuda Triangle.

programme.title: Conspiracy Files Unsealed: Cloning
programme.desc: Disturbing experiments in animal cloning go on behind closed doors and human cloning may soon be a reality.

programme.title: Conspiracy Files Unsealed: Bigfoot
programme.desc: The evidence for Bigfoot piles up, causing some to wonder who has been keeping information from the public.

programme.title: Conspiracy Files Unsealed: Anti-Christ?
programme.desc: Every culture and religion on the planet believes that an evil one will usher in the end of days. But who is this Anti-Christ? And how can we hope to stop him?

programme.title: Conspiracy Files Unsealed: Rise Of The Machines
programme.desc: If technology goes too far, too fast, a time may come when humans are no longer at the top of the evolutionary food chain.

programme.title: Conspiracy Files Unsealed: Stargate Portals
programme.desc: Discover doorways to wormholes in time, their secret locations around the world, as well as who is trying to open them and why.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: A man known to the CSIs becomes a key suspect in a murder investigation.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: A shocking event during an arrest leads the CSIs to a series of bizarre deaths.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: When a famous sitcom actress is murdered, the CSIs travel to LA.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: A private investigator turns up dead in what looks like a Mafia hit.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: The team rallies together when Warrick is shot in an alleyway.

programme.title: Scorpion: Scorp Family Robinson
programme.desc: Three weeks after they crash land on a deserted island, tensions run high for Team Scorpion when they must battle to overcome their relationship obstacles with each other in order to be rescued.

programme.title: Scorpion: Extinction
programme.desc: Team Scorpion must work with their old nemesis Mark Collins in order to prevent the extinction of mankind. Also, Walter and Paige awkwardly navigate their new relationship. Josh Leonard guest stars.

programme.title: Scorpion: More Extinction
programme.desc: Team Scorpion continues to work with their nemesis, Mark Collins, in order to prevent an extinction event that could end humanity. Also, Cabe's last-minute decision while on the case leads to the possible end of his career.

programme.title: Scorpion: Grow a Deer, A Female Deer
programme.desc: When poachers almost kill a pregnant endangered deer, Team Scorpion recreates the animal's womb to try to save it and its baby's life. Also, Happy and Toby discuss the future of their family.

programme.title: Scorpion: Nuke Kids on the Block
programme.desc: While decommissioning an old nuclear missile, a simple accident causes Team Scorpion to endure exposure to toxic vapor while trying to prevent the nuke from detonating.

programme.title: Scorpion: Sci Hard
programme.desc: While attending a tech convention, Team Scorpion is taken hostage by a group attempting a virtual heist.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Big Nickel
programme.desc: Andy’s attempt to avoid Swarek is thwarted whenbothare assigned to a prisoner transport. When things go awry and theinmate breaks loose, the two officers are led on a cat-and-mouse foot chase through the meandering woods.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: To Serve or Protect
programme.desc: What was to be a routine day for Andy is abruptly put on holdwhen herex-copper father, Tommy, confesses that he might have committed a serious crime during one of his alcohol-induced blackouts

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Judgment Day
programme.desc: There’s a nervous tension in the air on Judgment Day for all therookies at 15 Division who will have to undergo make-or-break assessments by Staff Sergeant Frank.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Takedown
programme.desc: Andy and Chris accidentally screw up one of the biggest drug busts of the decade when they arrest one of the players. In an effort to save the operation, Swarek and Andy go undercover to make the drug buy.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Butterflies
programme.desc: Andy's world explodes when a fresh-faced university student is killed in a random shooting, and a bullet hits Andy, lodging in her vest.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Might Have Been
programme.desc: Everyone's living their “might-have-beens.” Andy and Gail go undercover as cocktail waitresses to clean up a drug-infested club, but get more than they bargained for.

programme.title: Saw
programme.desc: A hospital orderly (Leigh Whannell) tells a police officer that he was kidnapped and forced to commit a horrific act to survive.

programme.title: Saw II
programme.desc: A detective and his team must rescue eight people trapped in a factory by the twisted serial killer known as Jigsaw.

programme.title: Saw III
programme.desc: Jigsaw abducts a doctor in order to keep himself alive while he watches his new apprentice put an unlucky citizen named Jeff through a brutal test.

programme.title: Checkpoint
programme.desc: The agent of an auto industrialist is sent to Italy to lure an Italian designer away from his firm. However, the plan goes wrong and leads to theft, corruption and even murder.

programme.title: Passport to Shame
programme.desc: In order to get a loan, a London cabdriver hastily marries a Frenchwoman, not realizing she is a recruit for a prostitution ring.

programme.title: Double Exposure
programme.desc: Private detective Pete Fleming receives a call from an advertising executive.

programme.title: JAG: Shifting Sands
programme.desc: When a Gulf War MIA victim is found as the sheik’s wife in a nomadic Arab tribe, Bud prosecutes and Mac defends her against charges of desertion and, in a stunning turn of events, treason. Harm tries to get his old job back but is turned away.

programme.title: JAG: The One That Got Away
programme.desc: Mac defends and Turner prosecutes in the case of a special op marine who, during an Iraqi mission, may have deserted his team for his own survival. Harm takes on a CIA training assignment in a mach six craft that soon has him in danger.

programme.title: JAG: Close Quarters
programme.desc: Back at JAG, Harm is flooded with cases but still wants to help out an 80-year-old veteran accused of robbery. Meanwhile, Turner takes on an assignment in a sub whose crew has rescued possible defecting North Koreans.

programme.title: JAG: Posse Comitatus
programme.desc: Harm and Mac argue the case of a Marine pilot who used force to interfere with a local police matter that led to a man’s killing. Roberts is the investigating officer in the matter of a Navy doctor who is requesting conscientious objector status.

programme.title: JAG: The Boast
programme.desc: When an unwitting corporal boasts to a reporter that he killed an Iraqi prisoner of war, facts begin to emerge that could convict him despite his later claim that he was only lying toi mpress.

programme.title: JAG: Pulse Rate
programme.desc: Harm and Mac go aboard the USS Gillcrist to determine if a seaman’s fatal accident during a routine repair was the result of a co-worker’s dereliction of duty or worse.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: Team One races to track down Ed's shooter, while his wife has problems delivering their baby.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: Team One confronts a rioting crowd after a cop who mistakenly shot and killed a young boy is declared innocent.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: Team One goes up against a notorious serial robber who streams his robberies on the internet.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: The SRU is called in when a mother and her daughter are abducted.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: Team One struggles with a secret that could compromise their drug bust and end Wordy's career.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: When Raf, a new recruit, joins Team One, he learns what it means to be a member of the Strategic Response Unit on one of their toughest days of the year forhostage and suicide situations.

programme.title: King Of California
programme.desc: Commercial airline pilot Whip Whitaker (Denzel Washington) has a problem with drugs and alcohol, though so far he's managed to complete his flights safely.

programme.title: Pudsey The Dog: The Movie
programme.desc: Pudsey The Dog: The Movie is ‘Babe’ meets ‘Marley and Me’ - a cheeky and downright hilarious animal adventure for the whole family! Oh and by the way… there are songs too!

programme.title: The Librarian: Quest for the Spear
programme.desc: As a means of finding the legendary book known as the Key of Solomon, Flynn pairs with a brainy archaeologist to first acquire the map legend. Unfortunately, they must elude the sinister General Samir and the ulterior plans of Flynn's uncle.

programme.title: The Beast Must Die
programme.desc: Eight people have been invited to an island estate for the weekend. One of them is a werewolf. Can you guess which one?

programme.title: Halloween
programme.desc: Fifteen years after murdering his sister on Halloween night 1963, Michael Myers escapes from a mental hospital and returns to the small town of Haddonfield, Illinois to kill again. Starring: Donald Pleasence, Jamie Lee Curtis, Tony Moran

programme.title: The Crazies
programme.desc: A small rural town finds itself in the grip of an infection which send its hosts into a violent, homicidal frenzy.

programme.title: Scarecrows
programme.desc: A claustrophobic supernatural siege film.

programme.title: Contamination
programme.desc: A deserted ship arrives in New York City carrying its slaughtered crew and a horrific cargo: Mutant green eggs the size of footballs that pulsate with life until they spray hideous chest-bursting death.

programme.title: Terror Train
programme.desc: Three years after a prank that went terribly awry, the six college students responsible are targeted by a masked killer at a New Year's Eve party aboard a moving train. Starring: Ben Johnson, Jamie Lee Curtis, Hart Bochner, David Copperfield

programme.title: Alice, Sweet Alice
programme.desc: A disturbing tale of murder and suspicion within a Catholic family.

programme.title: Day Of The Animals
programme.desc: Nature fights back in this eco-horror thriller.

programme.title: The Pack
programme.desc: A farmer and his family must fight for survival after a ferocious pack of wild dogs infiltrates their isolated farmhouse. Through a series of frightening and bloody encounters they are forced into survival mode to make it through the night.

programme.title: Vampire virus
programme.desc: A young woman contracts a deadly virus after an unusual sexual encounter.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-O (Original)
programme.desc: A young Marine veteran suffers a psychotic breakdown, which causes him to believe he is back in the battle zone in Vietnam. When Danny Williams tries to assist him, Austin holds him prisoner in a hospital ward.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-O (Original)
programme.desc: The death of a young girl while under the influence of drugs leads to Five-O tracking down the supplier, who turns out to be a self-styled guru who is headmaster to a large cult of hippies.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-O (Original)
programme.desc: McGarrett and his team of police experts go into action when a man who is carrying the bubonic plague turns up in the Hawaiian Islands and the plans for a top-secret military weapon disappear.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-O (Original)
programme.desc: McGarrett plays a long shot and offers himself as the key hostage in an attempted prison break. The two convicts, each facing life imprisonment, hold seven fellow inmates as hostages, demanding that the prison gates be opened.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-O (Original)
programme.desc: Five-O is called in when 72 employees of a family-owned million-dollar corporation are threatened with bodily harm, and the aging baroness of the corporation mysteriously disappears.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-O (Original)
programme.desc: A policeman starts a personal vendetta against the killers of his son, a young prizefighter who had been bribed to fix a fight.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: MacGyver and the Phoenix Foundation are overseeing the security and protection of Delasora during his trial. MacGyver is obsessed with the death of Murdoc and believes that he's still alive.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: MacGyver's neighbor Kelly Dobbs overhears a plan to have accountant VictorNesbitt murdered. Victor is an accountant with one of Lyle Knox's holding companies and is planning on exposing the company.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: MacGyver picks up his best friend's father to take him to his grandson's Bar Mitzvah and finds himself inadvertently involved in an FBI/CIA mission.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: After Prometheus, a crazed arsonist, is responsible for the death of his old friend, MacGyver sets out to solve the mystery of this madman and capture him.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: MacGyver faces the strange and frightening world of Voodoo, as he tries to save his politically active neighbor from a deranged, underground death squad.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Tony begins working with a new cabbie, Lucius, a former football player. Lucius inspires Tony to try to get his boxing license reinstated.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Ring the bells! Spread the word! Latka Gravas and Simka Dahblitz are getting married, and the dingy Sunshine Cab Co. garage is transformed into a chapel of beauty for the social event of the cabbies' season.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The unflappable Jim gets an unexpected jolt when a wrecking ball crashes through the wall of his condemned apartment. A disaster ensues when he is forced to move in with Louie.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The drivers bare their souls, recalling those moments in their lives when fate caused them to detour from the street of dreams down the alley to becoming a cabbie.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: As Elaine nears a decision on her future, the cabbies reminisce about those glorious things that "might have been" had fate not sent them down that treacherous road to the Sunshine Cab Co.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Reverend Jim comes to the rescue when Alex is consumed by gambling fever after a lucky night in Atlantic City.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: When Simka learns that Latka has been unfaithful, she is bound by tradition to do the same thing with one of Latka's fellow cabbies.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: After Latka has an affair with a female cabbie, Simka must do the same with one of his co-workers.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Jeff ends up in serious trouble after he confesses to stealing from the garage to protect the real villain.

programme.title: Friday The 13th: The Series
programme.desc: A homely high schooler gets hold of a cursed compact which forces anyone hit by its reflected light to fall in love with her but die for love.

programme.title: Friday The 13th: The Series
programme.desc: Tommy Chow gets hold of a set of tattoo needles. He tattoos an innocent victim, and the tattoo then comes to gory life and kills the victim. In return, Tommy gets good luck.

programme.title: Friday The 13th: The Series
programme.desc: An innocent man is condemned to the electric chair but manages to survive. Embittered, the man buys the electric chair from Lewis Vendredi.

programme.title: Friday The 13th: The Series
programme.desc: A man discovers a cursed trefinator in a museum warehouse: a device that transfers intelligence, the man uses it to make himself intelligent.

programme.title: New Twilight Zone: Welcome to Winfield
programme.desc: A grim reaper tracking a fleeing young man whose soul he is collecting follows the trail to a town seemingly from the Old West.

programme.title: New Twilight Zone: The Leprechaun Artist/Dead Run
programme.desc: Vacationing in the United States, an Irish leprechaun is caught by three boys. To be freed, he must grant them three wishes/A truck driver accepts a job to deliver souls to Hell.

programme.title: Matlock: The Assassination (Part 2)

programme.title: 48 Hours: Pain and Gain

programme.title: 48 Hours: A Brother's Mission
programme.desc: A report on the 2007 death of Karl Hoerig, a decorated military pilot from Ohio and his brother’s mission to track down and bring to justice the accused killer.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Death of a Dream

programme.title: 48 Hours: A Family Accused
programme.desc: A report that focuses on cases where people accused of sexually abusing children were tried and imprisoned based on little real evidence other than the testimony of young children.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Animal Instincts

programme.desc: What happens when you combine Greek Mythology with D.W.'s imagination? Then, getting two Polly Locket dolls almost ruins Prunella's birthday party. That, and Francine's bad mood--why, she wouldn't even sing the Happy Birthday song!

programme.title: Barney and Friends: This Way In, This Way Out!
programme.desc: Angela is in the park to release her turtle after observing him with her classmates in school. Barney and the children discuss the meaning of in and out after observing the turtle going in and out of his shell.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: When Baby Bop thinks the half-moon is somehow broken, Barney and Friends take an imaginary visit to the moon where Barney eases her concerns.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Stop! Go!
programme.desc: After playing with "Stop" and "Go" signs with Angela, Baby Bop leaves to direct some traffic of her own! Meanwhile, in the caboose, Barney and the kids enjoy a costume parade, a game of "Musical Stop & Go," and some very vigorous body movement.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: A creepy spider inspires Barney to tell the story of “The Reluctant Dragon.”

programme.title: Barney and Friends: It's Hot! It's Cold!
programme.desc: Throughout the day, Barney and the children learn about "hot" and "cold," but the fun really begins when Barney turns the playground into a winter/summer wonderland!

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Tea-riffic Manners
programme.desc: A tea party planned by the children turns into a fun opportunity to reinforce lessons about good manners! Throughout the day, Baby Bop is given helpful advice.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Best In Show - Ducks And Fish
programme.desc: When the kids decide to have a Dog Show to show off their pets, BJ feels a little left out. He doesn't have a dog, and he sure wishes he did! A friend from the park shares her dog with BJ so he can join in the fun.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Here Kitty, Kitty
programme.desc: When Miss Jo loses her cat, Barney and the children spend the day helping her find it. Along the way, they learn all about cats.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Big Brother Rusty
programme.desc: Barney's excited to find out that Rusty's family is adopting a new baby girl from China; however, Rusty feels differently. He's not sure if he's going to be a good brother, and he doesn't know much about China.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Primal
programme.desc: Scourge and Optimus Prime battle each other for the Jungle Planet Cyber Key with Override from Speed Planet and Lori from earth being the guest viewers.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Trust

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Trap

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Invasion
programme.desc: Starscream unleashes the ancient Decepticons in an attempt to find Earth's Cyber Planet Key, Optimus leads the Autobots in battle...

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Retreat

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Revelation

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Critical

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Assault
programme.desc: A three-way battle unfolds between the Decepticons, the Autobots, and Starscream's forces. Then, an Autobot warrior named Wing Saber appears.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Starscream

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: United
programme.desc: Override, Evac, and Leobreaker are sent to help the Cybertron Defense team on Cybertron. Megatron's Decepticons follow as well as Thunderblast who joins Megatron. Optimus and Wing Saber combine and overpower Starscream.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Cybertron
programme.desc: The Autobots are finally able to destroy Megatron. They then try to revive Cybertron using the Omega Lock, but it triggers a reaction that seemingly begins to tear apart the planet!

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob and team are building a barn for Farmer Pickles’ sheep, which has to be ready for the lambing season. Farmer Pickles brings the sheep down from the hills and puts them in a pen until the barn is finished.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob is building a new exercise park which Mr Dixon’s brother David, a famous goalkeeper, is going to open. Dizzy tries to cajole Spud into joining in a game of soccer, but uncharacteristically the scarecrow doesn’t want to play.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: It’s the team’s first full day in Sunflower Valley and the machines are all a bit nervous of the mammoth job ahead. All except for Muck who is determined to show that he’s not a bit worried. Travis arrives with Bob’s new mobile home.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: It's the start of a new road trip as savvy antiques aficionados Mark Stacey and Paul Laidlaw pit their expertise against each other on their journey from Lancashire to Somerset.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Paul Laidlaw buys some nightmarish figures and Mark Stacey goes retro as the boys travel across the country in style on the second leg of their trip.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: On the third leg of their road trip, Mark Stacey and Paul Laidlaw start their shopping in Stafford and finish with a nail-biting auction in Nantwich.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Paul Laidlaw gets a peek into the life of the royals and Mark Stacey learns about Pomp and Circumstance on the fourth leg of their road trip.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Two antiques experts Mark Stacey and Paul Laidlaw play with boats and helicopters as they storm towards the finishing line of this road trip.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: It's the start of a new road trip and antiques experts James Lewis and James Braxton kick off at Ampthill in Bedfordshire and head for Market Harborough with the popular hymn Amazing Grace ringing in their ears.

programme.desc: Kurt Parry discusses his early career competing with darts' toughest stars and his comeback to the game.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Till Death Do Us Part
programme.desc: In small town Ohio, a respected state trooper reports his wife missing. Then he tells the police she’s run off with a secret lover. But has she?

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: A Killer Among Us
programme.desc: In Thomaston Georgia, when local roofer Thomas Bragg is found murdered in his bed, the whole town is talking. The police suspect his wife, but they have no witnesses, no leads and no murder weapon.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: What Lies Below
programme.desc: When popular high school student Robert Piest disappears after his shift at a local drugstore, police in Des Plaines, Illinois, ask psychic Carol Broman for help.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Who Killed the Flower Girl
programme.desc: On July 1st 1996, 36-year-old Diana Goldston is abducted by a burly man in a pick-up truck in broad daylight outside the Denton, Texas bar where she sells flowers.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Buried in Debt
programme.desc: When wealthy Arizona businesswoman, Loretta Bowersock, vanishes on a shopping trip to Tucson, her charming partner claims she’s been abducted.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Breaking Up is Hard to Do
programme.desc: When Laura-Ann Beyerly vanishes without a trace, her parents immediately file a missing persons report. Her mother senses that something is wrong.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Murder Too Close to Home
programme.desc: When a swimming instructor, Mae Wentz, is brutally stabbed to death in her Boynton Beach home, Florida police comb the bloody crime scene for clues.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Damage Done
programme.desc: When New Jersey single mother Nicole Arochas vanishes after a night on the town, her parents suspect the worst and file a missing persons report.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Burning Betrayal
programme.desc: When 20-year-old Kim Antonakos disappears after a late night out in Manhattan, her father files a missing persons report.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Family Ties
programme.desc: When Mildred ‘Miss Louise’ Williams disappears from her small Maryland town, local police don’t take the case seriously.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Without Warning
programme.desc: This week’s episode of Sensing Murder promises greater co-operation between psychics and police, attempting to uncover the truth about the death of 18-year-old apprentice plumber Regan O’Donoghue, who was killed in a hit and run in 2007.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Blood Money
programme.desc: Psychics Kelvin Cruickshank (NZ) and Deb Webber (Aus) investigate the unsolved murder of Lower Hutt pensioner 91 year old George Engelbrecht. In 1979, a burglar broke into George's home and beat the old man to death in his bed.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: The Lie of the Land
programme.desc: Sue Nicholson and Deb Webber investigate one of the most complex and intriguing cases ever featured - did Waikato man Jason Dark commit suicide or was he murdered, as his family believes?

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Now You See Me
programme.desc: 26-year-old deaf woman Alexa Cullen vanished from her home in Manaia, on the Coromandel Peninsular in 1995. She had a history of hitch-hiking and police suspected she’d run away. But three years later, ominous rumors began circulating in the community.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Sensing Murder Insights - Special
programme.desc: Police detectives from around New Zealand reveal exciting new developments sparked by the Sensing Murder psychics in Series 1.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Ghostly Refuge
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS heads to Oswego, New York to investigate the renowned Fort Ontario. TAPS has investigated many forts, but never one that once served as a sanctuary for Jewish refugees during World War II.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Paranormal Politics
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS heads down South to help two different families find some closure. First stop is Baton Rouge, Louisiana to investigate the Old State Capital Building, which has endured theCivil War and a congressman's death.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Curtain Call
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS heads to Joliet, Illinois to investigate the Rialto Square Theater, which is becoming known for being more than just an entertainment venue.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Fear Factory
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS travels to Claremont, New Hampshire to investigate a former shoe and furniture factory, the Topstone Mill. What was once an abandoned space has now become a restaurant and bar...

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Tunnels of Terror
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS travels to Lockport, New York to investigate an underworld of tunnels. It holds a mystery of possible murder, multiple deaths and frightening phenomena. What stories do the spirits of Lockport Caves want to tell?

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Fury
programme.desc: Kathy, her two daughters and her new husband, "Farmer" thought they had the perfect, quiet life deep in the mountains of West Virginia.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Hostage to Fear
programme.desc: P.R.S. is summoned to help a family who has been haunted for years by spirits lurking in the house. Upon arrival the team finds a family that has become prisoners in their own home.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Vegas
programme.desc: The PRS travels to Sin City to investigate a 14-year old medium who claims to speak to a dead girl.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Invitation to Evil
programme.desc: Paula and her husband Mike are under siege by a purported shadow demon in their North Carolina home. Paula has witnessed a toddler bed levitating and heard deep growls. Michelle, Ryan and the team uncover the shocking truth behind the haunting.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Ghost On the Tracks
programme.desc: PRS is called to a New Jersey beauty salon, but they soon learn that the building's proximity to deadly train tracks might be the true cause of spirit activity.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Ghosts of the Forgotten
programme.desc: The PRS investigation into the haunted Lake County Poor House becomes a journey through one PRS team members? troubled past.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Paranormal Intervention
programme.desc: Carol Ann stays awake every night taping the voices of the dead. PRS cuts their winter break short to help her curtail her obsession and close this doorway to the dead--for good.

programme.title: Paranormal State: I Am Six
programme.desc: Laura has felt oppressed by a violent spirit ever since she heard a chilling EVP in the fall of 2007. The 26-year-old claims she's been beaten, choked, even forcibly submerged.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Shadow Caster
programme.desc: PRS investigates an Alabama home where clients, Georgiana and her two daughters, are so terrified, they moved out after only 18 months. They have seen shadow figures, been touched and have a recorded EVP stating, "Look at me, get out of here."

programme.title: Most Haunted: TOWNELEY HALL Pt1
programme.desc: Yvette Fielding is back with the first part of a brand-new episode of Most Haunted. The intrepid ghost hunter has taken her team to the historic hall, which is said to be haunted by ancestral ghosts, the apparition of a white lady and a demon dog.

programme.title: Most Haunted: TOWNELEY HALL Pt2
programme.desc: Watch the second part of Yvette Fielding and the Most Haunted team's investigation of a historic hall, where the paranormal activity includes the disembodied sounds of children laughing and crying and the apparition of a white lady.

programme.title: Most Haunted: GLOUCESTER PRISON Pt1
programme.desc: Yvette Fielding leads her team in a two-part investigation at the foreboding Gloucester Prison, one of Britain's most haunted places, known for its history of death, fear, pain, suicide, and incarceration

programme.title: Most Haunted: GLOUCESTER PRISON Pt2
programme.desc: The second part of Yvette Fielding and the team's investigation of the imposing and abandoned Gloucester Prison.

programme.title: Most Haunted: GLOUCESTER PRISON Pt3
programme.desc: The third part of Yvette Fielding and the team's investigation into the very haunted and abandoned Gloucester Prison. With the team splitting up the activity rises and something is trying to stop Yvette and Glen.

programme.desc: This episode features the following cases: Devil's Tattoo, Static Man, The Bloody Hand, Where Have All the Heroes Gone, War Surplus.

programme.title: Beyond Belief: Fact or Fiction: Episode 3
programme.desc: This episode features the following cases: The Prophecy, Couch Potato, Love Over the Counter, Imaginary Friend, Last Man on Earth.

programme.title: A Haunting: Spellbound
programme.desc: Sandra learns her house is haunted. She tries to perform Wiccan ceremonies but opens a portal.

programme.title: A Haunting: The Shadowman
programme.desc: Tim Yancey and his older brother Tom love playing in the woods surrounding their Florida home. One afternoon Tom senses a presence watching him from among the shadows. Days later, the same entity confronts Tim and chases him through the woods.

programme.title: A Haunting: Ghost Fury
programme.desc: Shortly after Alicia and Scott Cain move into a farmhouse in the quiet Ohio countryside, they learn their home was the site of a brutal murder decades earlier. Plagued by the ghosts of this horrific event, they call in the Fourman Brothers to investigate.

programme.title: The Last Witch Hunter
programme.desc: The last witch hunter (Vin Diesel) is all that stands between humanity and the combined forces of the most horrifying witches in history.

programme.title: Meet Dave
programme.desc: A crew of miniature aliens operate a spaceship that has a human form

programme.title: Cold Souls: Cold Souls
programme.desc: Paul is an actor who feels bogged down by his participation in a production of Chekov's play, Vanya.

programme.title: Love Potion #9
programme.desc: Paul, a geek biochemist with no luck at all with women, is persuaded by his friends to visit a gypsy. She gives him "Love Potion #9", an elixir which can potentially force anyone of the opposite sex to instantly fall in love with him.

programme.title: Find the Lady
programme.desc: Two gun toting hoodlums, Trigger (Mickey Rooney) & Leo (Dick Emery) are hired by the unscrupulous J.K. (Peter Cook) to kidnap his niece Victoria. What follows is lunacy on a scale rarely seen!

programme.title: Empire Records
programme.desc: A group of young, anti-establishment Gen-X employees fight to save their record store from being overtaken by a conglomerate retail record corporation.

programme.title: Black Knight
programme.desc: When a wisecracking black hustler from South Central L.A. finds himself transported back to medieval England, he leads the overthrow of an evil king and wins the heart of a proto feminist woman.

programme.title: Amityville II: The Possession
programme.desc: A prequel to "THE AMITYVILLE HORROR" This chronicles the Long Island house's early years as a haven for demonic forces intent on driving a father to beat the kids, a mother to prayer and a brother to lust after his sister. Before he murders them all!

programme.title: Legend
programme.desc: Two young people are entangled in the ongoing battle between good and evil.

programme.title: Nosferatu
programme.desc: Vampire Count Orlok expresses interest in a new residence and real estate agent Hutter's wife.

programme.title: Ghost in the Noonday Sun
programme.desc: In the 17th century, a pirate captain is murdered by his cook after he buries his treasure and marks it on a map but the poor-memory cook must rely on the captain's ghost to re-track the loot, since the map was drawn in disappearing ink.

programme.title: Red Sun: Red Sun
programme.desc: In 1870, a gang robs a train and steals a ceremonial Japanese sword meant as a gift for the U.S. President, prompting a manhunt to retrieve it.

programme.title: McLintock!
programme.desc: G.W. McLintock is a man with a reputation as wide as the desert, is as wealthy as any man could wish to be and is about to fall into trouble deeper than the Grand Canyon. Starring: John Wayne, Maureen O'Hara, Patrick Wayne

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The lazy Jackman brother's mortgage has been foreclosed. Unfit for farming, they head to a nearby town. The family patriarch becomes marshal and deputizes his sons.

programme.title: New Fist of Fury
programme.desc: A stylish remake of Bruce Lee's original Fist of Fury from the same director (Lo Wei), ‘New Fist of Fury’ was a vital landmark in the early career of the legendary Jackie Chan.

programme.title: The Outsider
programme.desc: Craig Fairbrass stars as Lex, who has been told that his daughter has died in LA. However, he finds that the body isn't his daughter, and that an internet fraudster has her hostage. Lex wreaks havoc through the streets of LA trying to find her.

programme.title: 500 mph Storm
programme.desc: When an energy experiment goes haywire, a rash of massive hurricanes rips across North America. A scientist must get his family to safety before the hurricanes merge, creating a "hypercane" with the power to wipe America off the map.

programme.title: A Thousand Kisses Deep
programme.desc: An unsettling drama that cinematically captures and recreates the psycho-analytic experience. Starring: Jodie Whittaker, Emilia Fox, Dougray Scott

programme.title: Awake
programme.desc: While undergoing surgery, a wealthy young man experiences intraoperative awareness and discovers that the surgical team intended to murder him.

programme.title: Mary Higgins Clark
programme.desc: Freddie has everything--a gorgeous new husband and half ownership of a winery. But when her business partner's wife is murdered, Freddi suspects her partner's new love.

programme.title: Robot Riot
programme.desc: A group of soldiers are dropped into an abandoned town with no memory of who or where they are only to discover that they are being used as "test subjects" for a new group of giant "battle robots" being controlled by an insane army general.

programme.title: Space Truckers
programme.desc: A space trucker and his cute fiancee are on their way from a space station to Earth with an unknown cargo. When space pirates hijack them, 5000 disintegrator robots are found in the cargo.

programme.title: Dark Star
programme.desc: Dark Star is a sci-fi/comedy film directed by John Carpenter and co-written with Dan O'Bannon. The "Beachball with Claws" segment of the film was reworked by Dan O'Bannon into the science fiction-horror film Alien.

programme.title: Ratchet and Clank
programme.desc: When the galaxy comes under the threat of a nefarious space captain, a mechanic and his newfound robot ally join an elite squad of combatants to save the universe.

programme.title: Mail Order Monster
programme.desc: A girl seeks help and guidance from a robot monster to cope with the bullies at school and her father's new girlfriend.

programme.title: Cadia: The World Within
programme.desc: Devastated by the loss of their mother, three teens discover a mystical realm ruled by unseen forces and must overcome evil in the order to return home.

programme.title: Benji
programme.desc: Two school kids strike up a friendship with an orphaned puppy named Benji. When danger befalls them and they end up kidnapped by robbers who are in over their heads, Benji and his scruffy sidekick come to the rescue.

programme.title: Conspiracy Files Unsealed: Stargate Portals
programme.desc: Discover doorways to wormholes in time, their secret locations around the world, as well as who is trying to open them and why.

programme.title: Conspiracy Files Unsealed: Top 10 Conspiracies Of All Time
programme.desc: Those in power have secrets they do not want average citizens to know.

programme.title: Conspiracy Files Unsealed: Remote Viewing
programme.desc: Documents may prove that the government has a secret group of remote viewers watching its citizens: the CIA's 'psy ops army'.

programme.title: Conspiracy Files Unsealed: America's Flying Saucer
programme.desc: Discover America's new killer aircraft and the out-of-this-world technology the US military uses to conquer the globe.

programme.title: Conspiracy Files Unsealed: Fake World Leaders
programme.desc: Fake World Leaders: Are Hitler, Saddam Hussein and Osama Bin Laden really dead? Experts find proof that several infamous world leaders didn't die when you think they did.

programme.title: Conspiracy Files Unsealed: Global Depopulation
programme.desc: Disasters, famine and pandemics threaten civilisation on a global scale. A cataclysmic event may spell the end of civilisation and the human race could face extinction.

programme.title: Conspiracy Files Unsealed: Secret Government Warehouses
programme.desc: From Fort Knox to Hangar 18 and Camp Hero, discover a series of top-secret and high-security national database centres.

programme.title: Conspiracy Files Unsealed: Top Ten Secret Societies
programme.desc: An elite group of power players may be plotting the fate of the planet. Discover the secrets behind ten powerful hidden organisations around the world.

programme.title: Conspiracy Files Unsealed: Nazis Today
programme.desc: For decades, there have been rumours key members of Hitler’s inner circle escaped the fall of Berlin - maybe even the Führer himself. But where did they go and what is their plan?

programme.title: What On Earth
programme.desc: Embark on an eye-opening journey as experts investigate the startling mysteries captured by satellites orbiting the Earth: from hidden worlds to unexplainable natural phenomena.

programme.title: What On Earth
programme.desc: Embark on an eye-opening journey as experts investigate the startling mysteries captured by satellites orbiting the Earth: from hidden worlds to unexplainable natural phenomena.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: The team rallies together when Warrick is shot in an alleyway.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: The team probes a series of murders where the bodies have been posed.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: The discovery of a body in a dumpster leads the CSIs to a powerful drug lord.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: The CSI team begin investigating a case involving the world of domination.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: A double fatality at a Korea Town party has the CSIs on the hunt for a missing boy.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: The team investigates when two nuns find a woman crucified in the rafters of their church.

programme.title: Scorpion: Sci Hard
programme.desc: While attending a tech convention, Team Scorpion is taken hostage by a group attempting a virtual heist.

programme.title: Scorpion: Queen Scary
programme.desc: At Halloween, Team Scorpion takes on a case to prove the existence of ghosts on the Queen Mary but find an all-too-real disaster when they locate a 'ghost ship' on a deadly collision course.

programme.title: Scorpion: Go With the Florence
programme.desc: While tracking a device that can prevent a nuclear meltdown through the Los Angeles sewers, Walter learns the nuances of listening and not offering advice to Paige.

programme.title: Scorpion: Faire is Foul
programme.desc: For Sylvester's birthday, Team Scorpion visits a renaissance festival, but the revelry is cut short when a group tries to rob a nearby police evidence locker.

programme.title: Scorpion: It's Raining Men (Of War)
programme.desc: On Thanksgiving, Team Scorpion's new neighbor, Florence \, joins them at sea on a mission to destroy a floating island of trash, but her flawed contribution leaves her, Walter and Happy stranded on the quickly dissolving island.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Might Have Been
programme.desc: Everyone's living their “might-have-beens.” Andy and Gail go undercover as cocktail waitresses to clean up a drug-infested club, but get more than they bargained for.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Bad Moon
programme.desc: As a full moon hangs over the city, the rookies are unnerved by a series of strange occurrences. While investigating the theft of three severed heads, Andy and Swarek pick up the trail of a mentally unstable man who has stopped taking his medication

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Heart & Sparks
programme.desc: As 15 Division recovers from the shooting of Det. Luke Callaghan, a series of arsons culminates in the torching of a laundromat – and the rookies are forced to confront their own burning issues.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Stung
programme.desc: Using a local car dealership, 15 Division runs a sting operation to crack down on suspects with outstanding warrants. One of the criminals they capture tries to bargain for a lighter sentence

programme.title: Rookie Blue: In Plain View
programme.desc: When a police informant is found murdered, 15 Division sets its sights on finding a weak link in the notoriously brutal East Jameson gang. Andy has to work closely with Detective Jo Rosati, a woman who seems far too interested in Andy’s fiancé, Luke.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: The One That Got Away
programme.desc: When a woman gets brutally attacked in the same manner as deceased rookie cop Zoe Martinelli. Det. Luke Callaghan is convinced that it’s the same suspect.

programme.title: Saw III
programme.desc: Jigsaw abducts a doctor in order to keep himself alive while he watches his new apprentice put an unlucky citizen named Jeff through a brutal test.

programme.title: Saw IV
programme.desc: Jigsaw may be dead, but his grisly tortures continue from beyond the grave in this nightmarish sequel.

programme.title: Saw V
programme.desc: The horror of Jigsaw lives on in this fifth part in the series that finds a cop taking up the murderous mantle of the late psychopath.

programme.title: Double Exposure
programme.desc: Private detective Pete Fleming receives a call from an advertising executive.

programme.title: Cage of Gold
programme.desc: A young bride believes that her husband has been killed. After a suitable period of mourning, she re-marries, only for her supposedly dead husband to return and attempt to extort money from her.

programme.title: 21 Days
programme.desc: After Larry Darrent accidentally kills his lover's blackmailing husband, someone else is arrested for the crime. Larry and Wanda have just three weeks together before the trial of the innocent man.

programme.title: Dr. Crippen
programme.desc: The true story of Dr Crippen, who was hanged in 1910 for poisoning his wife so he could be with his younger lover.

programme.title: JAG: Pulse Rate
programme.desc: Harm and Mac go aboard the USS Gillcrist to determine if a seaman’s fatal accident during a routine repair was the result of a co-worker’s dereliction of duty or worse.

programme.title: JAG: Good Intentions
programme.desc: Mac defends a petty officer and former alcoholic accused of a brutal murder after a drinking binge which renders him useless in remembering details that could help him. Roberts is entangled in the case of a Navy Commander accused of embezzling funds.

programme.title: JAG: People vs SECNAV
programme.desc: After an incident in Iraq claims the lives of innocent civilians, SecNav is brought up on charges of war crimes in International Court, and Harm and Mac must defend him. Meanwhile, during a trip to the arcade, little A.J. goes missing.

programme.title: JAG: Coming Home
programme.desc: A marine’s killing in Iraq has ramifications for JAG stateside as Harm helps the soldier’s family with a media onslaught, and Bud and Mac investigate the failure of his flack vest.

programme.title: JAG: Fighting Words
programme.desc: A general’s comments about Islam during a church service pit Harm and Mac against each other as a court-martial hearing examines whether those remarks were a danger to national security.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: When Raf, a new recruit, joins Team One, he learns what it means to be a member of the Strategic Response Unit on one of their toughest days of the year forhostage and suicide situations.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: Two bombs are set off while Sam, Spike and Raff are responding to a Hot Call at an office building, trapping them and nine civilians inside with a third seemingly non-diffusible bomb.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: Team One has an unusual case when a passenger jet is hijacked by a group demanding the release of a prisoner.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: Team One responds to 911 call where a masked gunman threatens a group of teens and kidnaps one of them.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: Team One thinks they have a simple case of robbery on their hands,but things get complicated when the victim sabotages the rescue.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: Team One is alerted to a situation in a bank where a woman who appears under duress is withdrawing all her money. When she sabotages her own rescue and escapes with her tormentor, the team turn their attention to her family, who is also in danger.

programme.title: The Librarian: Quest for the Spear
programme.desc: As a means of finding the legendary book known as the Key of Solomon, Flynn pairs with a brainy archaeologist to first acquire the map legend. Unfortunately, they must elude the sinister General Samir and the ulterior plans of Flynn's uncle.

programme.title: Master Harold and The Boys
programme.desc: Wholesome, empowering and set in the apartheid era in South Africa comes an uplifting tale of friendship, bravery and love. 17 year-old Hally (Freddie Highmore: Charlie and the Chocolate Factory) has grown up around his father's racist jokes.

programme.title: Coming Through the Rye: Coming Through the Rye
programme.desc: In 1969, the Holden Caulfield-obsessed Jamie Schwartz runs away from boarding school to find the reclusive author J.D. Salinger. Inspired by actual events, Jamie's search becomes a journey of sexual awakening, love and loss.

programme.title: The Crazies
programme.desc: A small rural town finds itself in the grip of an infection which send its hosts into a violent, homicidal frenzy.

programme.title: Rabid
programme.desc: A young woman develops a taste for human blood after experimental plastic surgery, and her victims turn into blood-thirsty zombies, leading into a city-wide epidemic. Director: David Cronenberg Starring: Marilyn Chambers, Frank Moore, Joe Silver

programme.title: One Step Beyond: Signal Received
programme.desc: In 1941 two sailors from HMS Hood, Watson and Breed, hear a strange radio broadcast stating that the ship has been sunk with heavy loss of life. Their shipmate Robin Hughes, however, hears that he will live to a ripe old age.

programme.title: One Step Beyond: The Confession
programme.desc: Standing on a soap box, Harvey Lawrence proclaims that he killed a man. A flashback reveals that when he was an up-and-coming lawyer prosecuting a man for murder, he deliberately allowed the man to hang.

programme.title: One Step Beyond: The Avengers
programme.desc: During the Second World war a Nazi general invites locals, whom he later plans to send to death camps, to a château for a celebration which, in its detail, copies one held there a hundred and fifty years earlier.

programme.title: One Step Beyond: The Prisoner
programme.desc: Ruth Goldman,a survivor of the Nazi death camps,receives a visitor,Hessler,who oversaw her cruel treatment during her imprisonment,and she kills him. However,it turns out that Hessler has been dead for several years.

programme.title: One Step Beyond: Blood Flower
programme.desc: Professor Carroll is a political theorist who nonetheless has a neutral stance when it comes to radical involvement. He becomes strangely political after sniffing a rare Latin American flower.

programme.title: Terror Train
programme.desc: Three years after a prank that went terribly awry, the six college students responsible are targeted by a masked killer at a New Year's Eve party aboard a moving train. Starring: Ben Johnson, Jamie Lee Curtis, Hart Bochner, David Copperfield

programme.title: Deadtime Stories
programme.desc: A babysitting uncle tells his charges three horror stories - about a killer witch, Little Red Riding Hood and a werewolf, and "Goldi Lox" and the three bears. Starring: Scott Valentine, Nicole Picard, Matt Mitler

programme.title: Aenigma
programme.desc: The spirit of a comatose teenage girl possesses the body of a newcomer to her girls boarding school to enact bloody revenge against the elitist, lingerie-clad coeds responsible for her condition.

programme.title: Pluto TV 80’s Horror

programme.title: Transylvania 6-5000
programme.desc: Two tabloid reporters (Jeff Goldblum, Ed Begley Jr.) go to a strange land to check on rumors of monsters running amok.

programme.title: The Amazing Transparent Man
programme.desc: A crazed scientist invents an invisibility formula. He plans to use the formula to create an army of invisible zombies.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-O (Original)
programme.desc: A policeman starts a personal vendetta against the killers of his son, a young prizefighter who had been bribed to fix a fight.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-O (Original)
programme.desc: Steve McGarrett flies to Los Angeles to build a case against a doctor who is victimizing his sister and her ill baby.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-O (Original)
programme.desc: Steve McGarrett takes a cure-all practitioner to court although public sentiment favors her and she seems to have a foolproof case.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-O (Original)
programme.desc: When a young leader of a peace movement is shot and killed, Five-O's investigation seems to face a blank wall. In seeking the culprit, McGarrett and his team of police experts must determine whether the victim — or someone else— was the intended target.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-O (Original)

programme.title: MacGyver

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: A retired silent film comedian, Pinky, donates his films to the Phoenix Foundation and together, he and MacGyver, find themselves caught in a deadly trap woven by a special effects master named Neil who is out for revenge.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: MacGyver helps his good friend Dent train for a boxing match and finds that he must rescue Dent's daughter from gamblers who have kidnapped her.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: While working at the Challenger Club, MacGyver finds he must save the local gang kids from Minton, the local gun supplier, who is planning to kill all the gang members as well as letting Brian Jefferies take the wrap for a murder he did not commit.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Alex dreams of a new career in show business when he takes a part-time job as an assistant to a Broadway producer.

programme.title: The Exes

programme.title: The Exes

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Phil and Stuart have a fight with Haskell and he moves out. Holly, desperate to keep them all together, sends Phil and Stuart to bring him home.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Holly accidently convinces Stuart to quit his dental practice and buy a restaurant. Haskell, sick of paying alimony, tries to persuade his ex wife Margo to marry her fiancé.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Stuart and Holly convince Margo to hold her wedding at their restaurant. Haskell, still desperately in love with Margo, tries to stop it.

programme.title: The Exes: A Little Romance
programme.desc: Phil (Donald Faison) uses Holly’s assistant to help him land a star jockey as a client, but he’s got his eyes on a bigger prize. Haskell (Wayne Knight) talks Stuart into selling sentimental mementos from his marriage but Stuart has trouble letting go.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Haskell (Wayne Knight) panics when his online girlfriend surprises him with a visit, because he used Phil’s (Donald Faison) picture as his own. Holly discovers a homeless man in the laundry room and learns appearances can be very deceiving.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Stuart’s (David Alan Basche) work life is turned upside down when Phil (Donald Faison) sleeps with his dental assistant. Holly (Kristen Johnston) lends Eden (Kelly Stables) some outfits and soon discovers her clothes have a better social life than her.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: When Stuart’s favorite restaurant is about to close, he takes Phil along for one last meal, only to bump into Phil’s ex-wife who is now engaged. Holly is baffled by mixed signals from a cute co-worker. Haskell starts an online traffic school.

programme.title: Full Custom Garage

programme.title: Full Custom Garage

programme.title: Full Custom Garage

programme.title: Full Custom Garage

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: De-Bug Life
programme.desc: The guys realize it is time for the annual cleaning of the duck blinds when they come across a gator using one as a home. Meanwhile, while the kids are running the church car wash, Si and Willie disagree on the best way to draw in customers.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Men vs. Wild
programme.desc: Brotherly competition is taken to a whole new level when Jase and Willie challenge Alan and Jep to a survival race through the woods on Phil's property. Meanwhile, Si is interested in finding a new hobby when he sees Kay cutting coupons.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Return of the Beavers
programme.desc: When Phil discovers more beaver activity on the Robertson land, he recruits Jase, Jep, and Si to get rid of them. Meanwhile, Willie and Korie bring Bella to her first day of karate practice.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: Stumped on a way to celebrate Willie's birthday, Korie enlists the guys' help and Jase takes the reigns in planning a trip to the lake where Phil and Kay used to live. Meanwhile, the women realize a raccoon is inside the lake house.

programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark are helping patients at Camp Good Times in different ways. But a father still refuses to deal with his son's illness.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Cindy

programme.title: Dynasty: The New Moguls
programme.desc: After meeting with Cora Van Husen, Krystle obtains a copy of the scandalous video, proving Blake's innocence; Dex discovers Sean is somehow involved with unsavory characters proposing a multi-million dollar oil venture to Denver-Carrington.

programme.desc: Forced by Adam and Fallon's vote, Steven reluctantly agrees to authorize the Vitron oil deal, as Sean's maniacal scheme to avenge his father's death begins to unfold; Krystle obtains a copy of Cecil Colby's original will.

programme.title: War Story: Bomber Command: Getting Home
programme.desc: In this film, Bomber Command personnel and a Luftwaffe pilot take the viewer through the frightening reality of fighting in the skies as they try to get a damaged bomber home.

programme.title: War Story: Bomb Girls Remember
programme.desc: During the Second World War, 250,000 Canadian women helped to build the arsenal of democracy. These young women met the challenges of factory work and helped to win the Second World War, and by doing so, paved the way for future generations.

programme.title: War Story: Sicily: The First Campaign
programme.desc: The Sicily Campaign began with the largest seaborne invasion in history on 9-10 July 1943. The Allied forces of Britain, Canada, and the United States sought to knock Italy out of the war and attack Germany from the south.

programme.title: War Story: Ortona: The War Inside
programme.desc: The War Inside is a personal retelling of one of the fiercest battles of the Italian Campaign from the searing points of view of Canadian infantrymen, a tanker, a stretcher bearer, and a German paratrooper.

programme.title: War Story: The Road to Rome
programme.desc: The Road to Rome examines the incredible experiences of Canadian veterans, the victories and horrors of armoured combat, and the pivotal value, far too often neglected, of the overall Italian Campaign.

programme.title: War Story: Out of the Clouds: Paras in Normandy
programme.desc: In Normandy, the 1st Canadian Parachute Battalion proved itself to be in the vanguard of the best-trained and toughest units in the Allied forces.

programme.title: War Story: Across the Rhine: Paras in Germany
programme.desc: In mid-September 1944, the remnants of the battered 1st Canadian Parachute Battalion participated in the largest parachute drop in history, fought a successful battle.

programme.title: War Story: Vengeance
programme.desc: In 1941, nearly 30,000 Jews escaped the ghettos and work camps and they joined the growing underground resistance army, actively fighting the Nazis.

programme.title: War Story: Prisoners of the Sun
programme.desc: On 16 November 1941, two Canadian battalions arrived in the British colony of Hong Kong. Their aim: Bolster the Empire’s defenses in the event of aggression by the restless forces of Japan, stationed only kilometres away in occupied China.

programme.title: War Story: The Last Ship: The Sinking of the Esquimalt
programme.desc: On 16 April 1945, a mere three weeks before German surrender, the submarine fired a single torpedo that sank the last Canadian naval vessel lost to enemy action.

programme.title: War Story: Buchenwald Airmen
programme.desc: For two months in 1944, 168 Allied airmen were shot down over occupied France, betrayed to the Gestapo by the same collaborator, transported to the Nazi concentration and slave labour camp Buchenwald.

programme.title: Combat Ships
programme.desc: In this episode we look at vessels built for amphibious combat. We begin by looking at the last reaming Landing Craft Tank (LCT) to serve on D-Day – LCT 7074. These huge landing craft were essential in delivering tanks, trucks, soldiers and supplies.

programme.title: How To Lose A War
programme.desc: Explore how the seeds of Japan's defeat in 1945 were sown a decade earlier with the occupation of Manchuria in China.

programme.title: How To Lose A War

programme.title: How To Lose A War

programme.title: Bomber: Terror of WWII: Rise of The Bomber
programme.desc: Rise of the Bomber: The story of a deadly war that intertwines Germany, Poland, Japan, Italy and Spain as the remorseless development of weapons and bombers.

programme.desc: With only four weeks left in the Atlantic Bluefin season, two boats have the challenge of novice fishermen on board – and it could make or break their season.
