programme.desc: The Atlantic Bluefin are starting to migrate out of New England waters, so the Gloucester fleet races to find any edge they can, but will their risky new strategies pay off?

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Twice Bitten
programme.desc: With only two weeks left on the North Atlantic Bluefin tuna fishing season, just one fish is not enough for the Gloucester captains – and the lure of doubling their luck is overpowering.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Money On The Line
programme.desc: In the first episode of a two-part season finale, Gloucester's reigning Bluefin champion Dave Carraro, of FV-tuna.com, starts the fishing season with a $20,000 lead over his rival.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Endgame
programme.desc: With only three days left in the North Atlantic Bluefin Tuna season, the captains of Gloucester race against each other - and an oncoming storm - in the battle to land their final fish of the season.

programme.title: Macintyre: Worlds toughest Towns: Prague
programme.desc: The city of Prague sees hordes of British stag party goers filing through its numerous nightclubs and sex clubs every year, all on a mission to have a great time in the heart of this famously liberal city.

programme.title: Macintyre: Worlds toughest Towns: Dublin
programme.desc: Dublin, Ireland. Home to Oscar Wilde, James Joyce, Boyzone and Donal MacIntyre. But unbeknown to most tourists beyond the bustling bars of Temple Street the city is in the middle of a drug fuelled gang war.

programme.title: Worlds Deadliest Gangs: Mexico
programme.desc: We take an undercover look at one of Mexico’s most endemic social problems and the criminal phenomenon that is Kidnapping. We speak to local experts upon the situation.

programme.title: Worlds Deadliest Gangs: Hells Angels
programme.desc: The World’s oldest and best known motorcycle club has had a particularly bloody period in it’s recent history. We sent a team to find out what went down in “The Great Nordic Biker Wars” of the mid nineties.

programme.title: Worlds Deadliest Gangs: Salford
programme.desc: The Hacienda is still a name that is renowned for being the pioneer in the UK House scene. It was also remembered for clubbing culture that was destroyed by gang activities.

programme.title: Worlds Deadliest Gangs: Highway 61
programme.desc: Highway 61 are New Zealands largest and most ruthless motorcycle ruthless gang. Once an underground organization, Highway 61 are moving into hard drugs and seeping into all areas of violent crime

programme.title: Worlds Deadliest Gangs: Tijuana
programme.desc: this programme takes a look at the real drug lords of Tijuana Mexico. We show how they came to gain power and control from their Columbian counterparts and focus upon the most vicious cartel run by two brutal brothers, The Arellano Felix Organisation.

programme.title: Wardens: Honesty Goes a Long Way
programme.desc: Michigan conservation officers patrol during the deer openers for both archery and firearm season. A DNR employee enjoys visiting state parks with her family.

programme.title: Wardens: Teaching, Fishing, and Fawn
programme.desc: A conservation officer in Michigan's District 6 encounters a captive fawn while officers in D2 patrol walleye anglers. An officer also works as a college professor while he's off-duty.

programme.title: Alien Mind Control: The UFO Enigma
programme.desc: This fascinating documentary offers an unprecedented look at a group of individuals who claim to have had life altering UFO encounters, and discovers the unique psychic abilities they unknowingly share.

programme.title: Alien Mass Sightings: The Undeniable Truth
programme.desc: Documentary analyzes mass alien sightings, questions reliability of official explanations, identifies common patterns for further investigation.

programme.title: Alien Contact: UFO Invaders
programme.desc: Hundreds of UFOs have crashed on Earth. Mankind has witnessed these crashes, communicated with the visitors, even left our planet with them once they are able to return to their worlds, but the most shocking revelation is the reason why they come.

programme.title: Roswell : The Untold Truth
programme.desc: Major Jesse Marcel investigates strange debris found in 1947, despite being told it's a weather balloon.

programme.title: Geordie Shore

programme.desc: 20-somethings Sophie and Niall are ready to buy their first place. They say they want something practical-but it soon becomes clear that for super-fussy Sophie- practical is no match for party pad.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: South East England
programme.desc: One family is stuck in a house bursting at the seams and the other is stuck in one room at mum and dads. It's a quest for space-and it's up to Kirstie and Phil to make these searches blast off.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Sutton Coldfield
programme.desc: Kirstie and Phil are kicking-off the series with one hell of a challenge, they're in Birmingham, house hunting for three generations of one family… one big house, for one big, extended family.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Yorkshire
programme.desc: This week we've been called in to help a lucky couple that have just scooped almost two million quid on the lottery and want to splash out on a swanky new pad.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: SW London
programme.desc: Even in the midst of the credit crunch, there are still some people who are buying, so this week Kirstie and Phil are in desirable south west London to find two very different properties.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: London Southside
programme.desc: Kirstie and Phil are searching in South London with three essential workers who need all the help they can get. They're all new to the area, have very modest budgets, and want to find their dream first homes.

programme.title: Arthur: D.W. Tale Spins/Prunella Gets It Twice
programme.desc: What happens when you combine Greek Mythology with D.W.'s imagination? Then, getting two Polly Locket dolls almost ruins Prunella's birthday party. That, and Francine's bad mood--why, she wouldn't even sing the Happy Birthday song!

programme.title: Arthur: Buster's Book Battle/On the Buster Scale
programme.desc: Lakewood Elementary has just instituted IRP; a program where kids can earn points (and prizes!) for reading. Then, Buster and Brain never agree on movies. Buster rates every film a 10+, while Brain doesn't seem to like anything.

programme.title: Arthur: Happy Anniversary
programme.desc: Arthur's parents have been married for 10 years and it's time to celebrate! But the festivities are cut short when the van breaks down, stranding the whole family. Will the Reads miss their fancy dinner reservation?

programme.title: Arthur: How The Cookie Crumbles/Sue Ellen's Littler Sister
programme.desc: What's a budding entrepreneur to do when her homemade cookies hit the big time? Especially when the recipe isn't really hers? Then, Arthur and Francine would love to lend their sisters to Sue Ellen, who's sick of being an only child.

programme.title: Arthur: Fright Night/Citizen Cheikh
programme.desc: Buster’s Uncle Bob – portrayed by special guest R.L. Stine – comes to visit and tells Buster a spooky bedtime story. Then, Cheikh learns that he and his family will become American citizens!

programme.title: Arthur: Whip. Mix. Blend./Staycation
programme.desc: When Rattles's mom starts dating Archie Vanderloo, Rattles finds himself spending time with his twins, but they don’t have anything in common. Arthur offers to babysit so that his parents can enjoy some peace and quiet in the backyard.

programme.title: Arthur: Shelter from the Storm (Part 1 & 2)
programme.desc: When a powerful hurricane hits Elwood City, everyone's affected. Ladonna's dad is called up by the Army Corps of Engineers. Muffy relocates to a shelter. And Arthur struggles to reunite lost pets and owners.

programme.title: Arthur: Caught in the Crosswires/Framed
programme.desc: Muffy is thrilled when mega producer J3 chooses her family for his latest reality TV project. After all, she was born to be star! Buster has just won the best young artist award at the Elwood City Arts Festival.

programme.title: Arthur: Buster's Secret Admirer/The Last King of Lambland
programme.desc: Buster receives a box of chocolates in the mail from a secret admirer. It's driving him crazy! Who could possibly like him that much? And James receives a gift from his uncle in Scotland--a toy lamb that will give its owner special powers!

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Big Brother Rusty
programme.desc: Barney's excited to find out that Rusty's family is adopting a new baby girl from China; however, Rusty feels differently. He's not sure if he's going to be a good brother, and he doesn't know much about China.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Baby Bop forgets to say "please" and "thank you". Riff shares his dream of becoming an inventor.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Let's Make Music
programme.desc: Barney, Baby Bop and BJ have fun learning about music, rhythm and musical instruments. Barney introduces many different instruments and BJ dreams of one day becoming a rock 'n roll star. They discover that music gives everyone a happy feelin.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Sharing Is Caring!
programme.desc: The children bring toys to donate to Mr. Boyd's toy drive. Baby Bop and BJ arrive and after some convincing, Baby Bop learns about the merits of sharing.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: You Can Count on Me
programme.desc: Barney helps his friends discover just how fun numbers can be by taking them on a number hunt in the park. Baby Bop delights in sharing her favorite number and the kids discover that numbers can be found everywhere.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Let's Play Games!
programme.desc: It's fun and games with Barney and his friends! BJ's favorite way of getting exercise is by playing sports and games. When Baby Bop is shy about trying new games, Barney and his friends show her how tee-rific trying something new can be.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Barney and his friends are excited about a fishing contest. Barney tells Riff about a famous musician named Beethoven who wrote beautiful music even when he couldn't hear.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: The New Kid - The Princess And The Frog
programme.desc: When Riff meets a new friend in the park, BJ feels a little left out. BJ goes to great lengths to try to find a new friend for himself. Barney helps BJ see that we don't have to forget old friends when we make new ones.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Cybertron
programme.desc: The Autobots are finally able to destroy Megatron. They then try to revive Cybertron using the Omega Lock, but it triggers a reaction that seemingly begins to tear apart the planet!

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Balance
programme.desc: The true form of planet Cybertron is revealed as the planet sized transformer, Primus. Jolt is used as the device to connect and relay the messages of Primus, who begins to speak of things that have long since passed.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Darkness
programme.desc: The Autobots search for Jolt and the kids who have been kidnapped by Sideways and Starscream, but Megatron has discovered new information regarding Unicron's dark power that could alter the effects of the war.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Memory
programme.desc: The kids are forced to use trickery to keep Sideways and Starscream from deleting Jolt's memory, but the Autobots are getting closer with every minute.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Escape
programme.desc: Jolt and the kids manage to get off a distress call, but Megatron refuses to let Optimus out of battle forcing Vector Prime to lead the rescue team with one big question: will they arrive on time?

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Family
programme.desc: In order to rescue his brother, Coby decides to go to Giant Planet. But before he leaves, he tries to tell his parents about the Transformers.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Titans
programme.desc: Primus tries to use his spark energy to stop the black hole but Starscream interferes by throwing himself into Primus's spark energy, this causes him to grow to planet size. He then decides to take on Primus.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Warp
programme.desc: The Autobots travel to the Giant Planet on the old Atlantian ship Ogygia, but in the space bridge they must face off with the very mind of Atlantis itself.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Giant
programme.desc: The Autobots must convince giant Transformers who are only interested in building new buildings to assist them in their search for the Cyber Planet Key.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Fury
programme.desc: The Autobots begin the search for the missing Cyber Planet Key, but there about to have bigger problems on hand as Megatron is resurrected into the mighty Galvatron.

programme.desc: Today in Teletubbyland, the Teletubbies are being quiet. A teddybear does a dance for the Teletubbies and the Teletubbies watch a little girl tap dancing. The Teletubbies go walking all around Teletubbyland.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch three boys fill a sand pendulum and make a picture. Tinky Winky, Dipsy and Laa-Laa follow Po everywhere. The animals march through Teletubbyland, before it is time for Tubby Bye-Bye.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: It’s the team’s first full day in Sunflower Valley and the machines are all a bit nervous of the mammoth job ahead. All except for Muck who is determined to show that he’s not a bit worried. Travis arrives with Bob’s new mobile home.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Trix is looking for something to do so JJ sends her to deliver a bag of wood chippings to Bob who is building a Jungle Jim climbing frame in the school playground. Trix likes being busy and starts offering to fetch and carry everything for everyone.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: It’s a big day, as the team are building Bob’s new workshop at his new yard. Scoop is desperate to get stuck in and beavers about doing everything he can to help. Bob needs some old floorboards collecting from Bobsville, and sends Scoop to pick them up.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob and the team are drilling a special well at their homestead. The well has its own water tank, which needs to be raised from the ground on rocks. Wendy and Scrambler arrive for the first ever time in Sunflower Valley..

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: It’s a blistering hot day on Sunflower Valley. Bob and Wendy have got to finish building their workshop – making the workbenches and installing the power tools – it’s an inside job so the machines all get the day off.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob, Scoop and Skip are helping Mr Beasley to install a new Rockery when Mr Bentley appears to ask for Bob’s help. The Mayor wants to stage an art exhibition, but there are no available venues. Scoop suggests renovating the inside of the Old Mill.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Mr. Beasley decides to grow pineapples, and the best way top do this is to build a pineapple pit – a special pit, heated by horse manure! Travis wants to help and decides to fetch some horse manure from Farmer Pickles farm in Bobsville as quick as he can.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: A fierce storm is forecast for Bobsville. At the farm Travis stays safe and snug in his shed, while Spud takes cover in a large barn. The storm causes a lot of damage and a tree falls on Spud’s barn – he’s okay, but his nose is a bit squashed!

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob and the gang have been asked to replace some burst pipes under the main road. Meanwhile Jenny is in town to persuade Wendy to take a much-needed holiday. Unfortunately, there’s lots of work to do and Wendy simply doesn’t have time to go away.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob has a plan to accommodate all of the newcomers. He’s designed a kit house that clips together quickly and easily. Bob’s dad Robert comes to the valley to help build the houses, while Mr and Mrs Bentley conduct a survey on the newcomers’ requirements.

programme.title: The Big Dino Dig
programme.desc: In this new episodic special Bob and the team tackle a big new job – building a dinosaur-themed fun park. With the help of park manager Tony Toberomi and new dumper truck Rubble, the team constructs a roller coaster, slide, train ride and flying ride.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Roley is desperate to help with the apple harvest, but there’s not much a road roller can do to help. Farmer Pickles, meanwhile, asks Bob to build him a new press to make apple juice. Roley tries to help Spud collect a load of apples

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: The team are building Sunflower Valley’s first geodesic dome. As Wendy has organised the dome and knows how it all fits together, Bob suggests that she might like to take charge of the job. Reluctantly Wendy agrees.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Scoop and the machines are in Sunflower Valley setting up Wendy’s caravan. Scoop contacts Muck to find out where Bob has got to. Muck explains that they haven’t left Bobsville yet because they’ve lost Bob’s Dad!

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: The team are taking a break from building so they can tidy-up all the left over materials from around the Valley. Farmer Pickles asks Bob if he’ll put together Scruffty’s new kennel. Bob’s got a busy morning but agrees to build the kennel later on.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Farmer Pickles has a new family of Pigs being delivered to his farm and Bob must build a new home for them. In the meantime, Farmer Pickles places the pigs in an old Barn to keep them safe.

programme.desc: It's the start of a new road trip and antiques experts James Lewis and James Braxton kick off at Ampthill in Bedfordshire and head for Market Harborough with the popular hymn Amazing Grace ringing in their ears.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Family Ties
programme.desc: When Mildred ‘Miss Louise’ Williams disappears from her small Maryland town, local police don’t take the case seriously.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Fatal Extraction
programme.desc: A Pennsylvania factory-town is terrified when Dr. John Yelenic, a much-loved, local dentist is found murdered in his home.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Femme Fatality
programme.desc: A recent Harvard grad, 23-year-old Laura Houghteling, has just moved home to begin a promising new career as a Washington, D.C. lawyer.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Suddenly Psychic
programme.desc: When a 31-year-old nurse and single mother, Melanie Uribe, is carjacked in an L.A. suburb, police find her burned out truck the same night, but no trace of the victim.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Halloween Homicide
programme.desc: It’s Halloween night 2004, and two popular young women are brutally stabbed to death in their Napa Valley home.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Taken By Storm
programme.desc: In the icy waters of the Atlantic off the coast of Maine, a lobster boat fails to return from a day of setting traps. With no Mayday, no word from the crew, the Coast Guard knows it has to act fact.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Jason Williams
programme.desc: Jason Williams goes out to meet friends for a night of drinking. He never returns. His family is frantic, it’s uncharacteristic of him to be out of touch.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Amie Hoffman
programme.desc: Teenager Amie Hoffman disappears after work one night. Police are on the case but when a family friend calls psychic Nancy Weber, she sees Amie’s murder in a bizarre vision.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Last Orders at The Fleece Inn
programme.desc: The team heads to Elland to investigate ghostly-goings on in this haunted pub. It's not just the spirits behind the bar lurking here. Multiple hauntings, murders and death surround this public house.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Sensing Murder Insights - Special
programme.desc: Police detectives from around New Zealand reveal exciting new developments sparked by the Sensing Murder psychics in Series 1.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Walk of Innocence
programme.desc: In 1970, eighteen-year-old Olive Waiker disappeared as she walked across Rotorua to babysit her nieces and nephews. Her semi-naked body was found hours later in a rest area south of the city..

programme.title: Sensing Murder: A Mother's Worst Nightmare
programme.desc: Otautau toddler Amber-Lee, aged two and a half, vanished from Kingston at the southern tip of Lake Wakatipu on October 17, 1992.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Psychics Revealed - Special
programme.desc: Behind the scenes with the psychics on the show.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: The Patient Killer
programme.desc: In 1976, thirteen-year-old schoolgirl Tracey Ann Patient was plucked off Auckland's Great North Road. The following morning, her body was found dumped 16 km away in the Waitakere Ranges, having been strangled with a pantyhose tourniquet.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Tunnels of Terror
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS travels to Lockport, New York to investigate an underworld of tunnels. It holds a mystery of possible murder, multiple deaths and frightening phenomena. What stories do the spirits of Lockport Caves want to tell?

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Heir Apparition
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS travels to Hampton Falls, New Hampshire to investigate the Governors Mansion, a property Steve has investigated before with a local team.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Paranormal Pioneers
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS travels to Gloucester, Massachusetts to investigate Hammond Castle.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Higher Dead/ucation
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS travels to Bowling Green, Kentucky to investigate Western Kentucky University's three stories of death and terrifying paranormal activity.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Due Date With Death
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS travels to Rochester, New York to investigate the Rochester Public Library's 15 years of claims. There's reason to believe that two deaths associated with the building could be behind the activity.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Haunted Home for the Holidays
programme.desc: On this Christmas episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS returns to Hartford, Connecticut to investigate the Mark Twain House.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Shadow Caster
programme.desc: PRS investigates an Alabama home where clients, Georgiana and her two daughters, are so terrified, they moved out after only 18 months. They have seen shadow figures, been touched and have a recorded EVP stating, "Look at me, get out of here."

programme.title: Paranormal State: Laws of Attraction
programme.desc: When Paula's young autistic son Michael, with limited verbal skills uttered the words "Go away scary dead boy" -- it sent a chill up her spine.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Night Terrors
programme.desc: Ryan leads his team to one of the most haunted places in the US to confront their fears and solve a paranormal mystery. Aside from the alleged spirits of dead prisoners, something even darker may be lurking inside West Virginia State Penitentiary.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Southern Discomfort At Sweetwater Mansion
programme.desc: PRS heads to the Deep South to investigate a haunted Antebellum Mansion in disrepair. The caretaker and volunteers at the property have many a tale to tell of paranormal activity.

programme.title: Paranormal State: First Contact
programme.desc: Washington State, a hotbed of unexplained paranormal activity. Between possible UFOs in the sky and winged creatures in the woods, Ryan and his team are forced to face their fears and deal with the question: Are we truly alone in the universe?

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Anniversary
programme.desc: Ever since a close-knit Kentucky family moved into their new home, they've been visited by the spirit of a young girl.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Boy Pushed Me
programme.desc: Bruce and Danielle are terrified by an EVP recorded in their Indiana home stating "Kill them." Even more chilling, their toddler son survived a fall out of a window only to tell his parents, "Boy pushed me."

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Sickness
programme.desc: Something is making Lisa and her family sick. Is it natural or paranormal? Ryan and the team uncover the tragic history surrounding Lisa's home--with shocking connections to respiratory illness.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Darkness Falls
programme.desc: Ryan leads his team to one of the most haunted places in the US to confront their fears and solve a paranormal mystery. Aside from the alleged spirits of dead prisoners, something even darker may be lurking inside West Virginia State Penitentiary.

programme.title: Most Haunted: GLOUCESTER PRISON Pt3
programme.desc: The third part of Yvette Fielding and the team's investigation into the very haunted and abandoned Gloucester Prison. With the team splitting up the activity rises and something is trying to stop Yvette and Glen.

programme.title: Most Haunted: SECRET LOCATION PT1
programme.desc: Yvette Fielding leads team in a violent, secret investigation. Place's name and location concealed due to extreme haunting. Little history, aggressive entities a mystery. Can they reveal the darkness and face the unknown?

programme.title: Most Haunted: SECRET LOCATION PT2
programme.desc: Most Haunted's deadliest investigation, Part 2. Spirits emerging, team's resolve tested as darkness envelops. Growing fear, team's safety at stake. Can they continue?

programme.title: A Haunting: The Forgotten
programme.desc: A family begins renovating their new house, unaware of a ghostly inhabitant that hates change.

programme.title: A Haunting: Ghost Protector
programme.desc: A mother and daughter both believe their house is haunted. But while the mother believes it's the spirit of her murdered boyfriend, her daughter believes it's much darker. Paranormal experts investigate and uncover an epic battle between good and evil.

programme.title: A Haunting: The Lake Club Horror
programme.desc: The Lake Club is transformed into a rock n roll nightclub with mysterious happenings.

programme.title: A Haunting: Conjuring Evil
programme.desc: Harold and Cindy have found the perfect retreat in suburban Alaska for their family. But after their daughter begins to experiment in witchcraft, she unknowingly attracts the attention of a dark entity. Harold calls in experts to help reclaim the home.

programme.title: A Haunting: Wicked Eviction
programme.desc: Tammy Shea, a single mother of three, relocates her family for a fresh start but her dream turns to a nightmare when her family is antagonized by multiple entities. Desperate, Tammy finds a paranormal team who reveal the true evil in the home.

programme.title: A Haunting: Mother's Terror
programme.desc: When Jeanette's firefighter husband dies in the line of duty, she moves her daughters to a rustic hamlet in Long Island to start anew. Shortly after moving in, an evil entity lashes out at her daughter, Jeanette refuses to quit without a fight.

programme.title: Cold Souls: Cold Souls
programme.desc: Paul is an actor who feels bogged down by his participation in a production of Chekov's play, Vanya.

programme.title: Evening
programme.desc: As Ann Lord reflects on one beautiful and life-changing weekend with the one true love of her life, her daughters come to their own understanding about the power of the past and the unbreakable bonds between mothers and daughters.

programme.title: Meet Dave
programme.desc: A crew of miniature aliens operate a spaceship that has a human form

programme.title: Black Knight
programme.desc: When a wisecracking black hustler from South Central L.A. finds himself transported back to medieval England, he leads the overthrow of an evil king and wins the heart of a proto feminist woman.

programme.title: Whip It
programme.desc: In Bodeen, Texas, an indie-rock loving misfit finds a way of dealing with her small-town misery after she discovers a roller derby league in nearby Austin.

programme.title: You May Not Kiss the Bride
programme.desc: Bryan is a quiet, photographer but when he falls foul of local gangsters, he is forced to marry the boss's daughter, Masha, in order for her to get her green card. They are sent to a remote tropical island for a honeymoon that is far from idyllic.

programme.title: Ghost in the Noonday Sun
programme.desc: In the 17th century, a pirate captain is murdered by his cook after he buries his treasure and marks it on a map but the poor-memory cook must rely on the captain's ghost to re-track the loot, since the map was drawn in disappearing ink.

programme.title: The Hitch-Hiker
programme.desc: Two fishermen pick up a psychopathic escaped convict who tells them that he intends to murder them when the ride is over.

programme.title: Gold
programme.desc: A ruthless global cabal of financial investors plan to manipulate the price of gold by flooding one of South Africa’s top gold mines. Starring: Roger Moore, Susannah York, Ray Milland, Bradford Dillman, Bernard Horsfall, John Hussey

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The lazy Jackman brother's mortgage has been foreclosed. Unfit for farming, they head to a nearby town. The family patriarch becomes marshal and deputizes his sons.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas, who blames his wife's death on his father-in-law, refuses to help the old man elude a gang of gunmen.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mario Arsatti claims to be an acquaintance of a good friend from Lucas' past. But it's pleasure before business. Mario has been hired to kill Lucas.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark is injured in an accident, leaving his legs paralyzed. At the doctor's suggestion, Lucas and Mark set out on a trek to Mission Springs.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas is baffled when the marshal of a neighboring town refuses to hold a gambler who just attempted murder.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: While Mark goes hunting for Old Spike, Lucas goes hunting for his mortal enemy. Lucas is thrown into jail to stop him from murdering his former friend.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark and Lucas run into Micah on the trail and help when the prisoner he is transporting injures his arm. Lucas' life is endangered when a snake crawls into his bed.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: At Halloween, rustlers take advantage of the seasonal disguises to raid a cattle ranch. Lucas' faith in his son's honesty is shaken when he hears rumors of Mark being mixed up with the thieves.

programme.title: 500 mph Storm
programme.desc: When an energy experiment goes haywire, a rash of massive hurricanes rips across North America. A scientist must get his family to safety before the hurricanes merge, creating a "hypercane" with the power to wipe America off the map.

programme.title: The Cannonball Run
programme.desc: The classic comedy with cool stars and even cooler cars! Based on a true race event, Burt Reynolds leads an all-star cast in the ultimate quest to win The Cannonball Run.

programme.title: Jet Stream
programme.desc: A TV weatherman tries to prove his theory that a series of unexplained catastrophes are the result of powerful winds found in the upper atmosphere coming down to ground level.

programme.title: Mary Higgins Clark
programme.desc: Freddie has everything--a gorgeous new husband and half ownership of a winery. But when her business partner's wife is murdered, Freddi suspects her partner's new love.

programme.title: Despite The Falling Snow
programme.desc: In 1950s Moscow, communist Katya secretly spies for the Americans in the Cold War arms race. When she lands her biggest assignment, stealing secrets from rising government star Alexander, the last thing she expects is to fall in love with him.

programme.title: Mary Higgins Clark
programme.desc: Sterling Brooks, a self-absorbed stock broker, is killed in a freak golfing accident. In order to secure a heavenly future, Sterling is given the opportunity to help a needy young girl reunite with her family in time for Christmas.

programme.title: Dark Star
programme.desc: Dark Star is a sci-fi/comedy film directed by John Carpenter and co-written with Dan O'Bannon. The "Beachball with Claws" segment of the film was reworked by Dan O'Bannon into the science fiction-horror film Alien.

programme.title: Time Runners
programme.desc: Special Agent Sally Biggs has a secret, she can rewind time whenever she wants. It's enough to make her a celebrity at the FBI and allows her to control almost everything in her life... Except for the disappearance of her husband.

programme.title: Drone DR1 (AKA Rotor DR1)
programme.desc: In a post-apocalyptic world where half the population is dead or missing and the sky is full of autonomous drones, a 16-year-old boy named Kitch sets out to find his father, joined by DR1, his drone companion.

programme.title: Benji
programme.desc: Two school kids strike up a friendship with an orphaned puppy named Benji. When danger befalls them and they end up kidnapped by robbers who are in over their heads, Benji and his scruffy sidekick come to the rescue.

programme.title: The Secret Garden
programme.desc: Experience the magical world of 'The Secret Garden' as never before in this beautiful production of the classic tale. When her parents are lost in a tragic accident, Mary must seek comfort in the strange and forgotten corridors of Misselthwaite Factory.

programme.title: Captain Sabertooth
programme.desc: The orphan boy Pinky follows the Captain on an exciting and dangerous journey across the big oceans to the kingdom of Lama Rama, hunting for a treasure and the answer to who is Pinky's father.

programme.title: What On Earth
programme.desc: Embark on an eye-opening journey as experts investigate the startling mysteries captured by satellites orbiting the Earth: from hidden worlds to unexplainable natural phenomena.

programme.title: What On Earth
programme.desc: Embark on an eye-opening journey as experts investigate the startling mysteries captured by satellites orbiting the Earth: from hidden worlds to unexplainable natural phenomena.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: The team investigates when two nuns find a woman crucified in the rafters of their church.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: The CSIs investigate the mysterious disappearance of two boys.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: A man incriminates himself when he falls in cement while trying to transport a dead body.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Catherine and Nick investigate a case in which a guilty man was proven innocent.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: The team is joined by a new CSI, Michael Keppler, who assists them on a case.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Catherine reluctantly agrees to help Keppler deceive the team in order to catch a murderer

programme.title: Scorpion: It's Raining Men (Of War)
programme.desc: On Thanksgiving, Team Scorpion's new neighbor, Florence \, joins them at sea on a mission to destroy a floating island of trash, but her flawed contribution leaves her, Walter and Happy stranded on the quickly dissolving island.

programme.title: Scorpion: Crime Every Mountain
programme.desc: As Cabe's trial looms over Team Scorpion, a simple case goes sideways when they help a father and his daughter whose plane crashes nearby.

programme.title: Scorpion: Who Let the Dog Out ('Cause Now It's Stuck in a Cistern)
programme.desc: As Team Scorpion anxiously awaits the verdict of Cabe's trial which could send him to prison, they focus their nervous energy on trying to save a dog stuck in a cistern.

programme.title: Scorpion: A Christmas Car-Roll
programme.desc: On Christmas Eve, when Walter chooses work over spending quality time with his friends, he falls down the stairs and hits his head, and as he lays unconscious, he enters a dream world where Team Scorpion never existed.

programme.title: Scorpion: The Bunker Games
programme.desc: Team Scorpion must work with Toby's nemesis, Quincy Berkstead and his wife, Amy , when they are locked inside an artificially intelligent doomsday bunker that aims to kill them.

programme.title: Scorpion: Lighthouse of the Rising Sun
programme.desc: A solar storm knocks out power in Los Angeles, and Team Scorpion must help a teen pilot and his girlfriend who are lost over the Pacific without navigation or radio contact.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: The One That Got Away
programme.desc: When a woman gets brutally attacked in the same manner as deceased rookie cop Zoe Martinelli. Det. Luke Callaghan is convinced that it’s the same suspect.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Monster
programme.desc: After a seemingly drunken man collapses in the barn, 15 Division is put under quarantine. Andy and Swarek work together to find the accomplice of a dyed blue bank robber

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Brotherhood
programme.desc: Dov and Gail work together under Swarek’s expert tutelage in a stake-out operation to stop an Asian gang from killing a snitch.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Best Laid Plans
programme.desc: 15 Division’s hunt for an armed robber leads them to the scene of a horrible car accident. While Andy deals with a woman pinned in her car, the other officers must track and apprehend the fugitive

programme.title: Rookie Blue: A Little Faith
programme.desc: When Traci and Andy are sent out on an undercover training exercise, they stumble upon a young woman who is about to die of an overdose. Meanwhile, Dov finds himself on a “ride-along” with a drug dealer and old friend of his deceased brother

programme.title: Rookie Blue: On The Double
programme.desc: When Gail Peck’s uniform is stolen, the rookies go after a vigilante who is impersonating a police officer. Meanwhile, Swarek’s off the grid, trying to get information out of former crime enforcer Jamie Brennan

programme.title: Saw V
programme.desc: The horror of Jigsaw lives on in this fifth part in the series that finds a cop taking up the murderous mantle of the late psychopath.

programme.title: Impact Earth
programme.desc: An astronomy professor discovers an asteroid is on a collision course with Earth, and rushes to get his family to safety while alerting the world to the danger.

programme.title: Superfire
programme.desc: Smoke jumpers and tanker pilots try to save stranded teens and an entire Oregon town from three raging fires.

programme.title: Only the Brave
programme.desc: The Granite Mountain Hotshots become one of the most elite firefighting teams in the country. Watching over lives, homes and everything people hold dear, they forge a unique brotherhood that comes into focus with one fateful fire in Yarnell, Ariz.

programme.title: Dr. Crippen
programme.desc: The true story of Dr Crippen, who was hanged in 1910 for poisoning his wife so he could be with his younger lover.

programme.title: To the Public Danger
programme.desc: Four people meet in a pub and enjoy alcohol fuelled thrill seeking until things get out of hand and each person faces a moral choice with long-lasting consequences.

programme.title: The Intruder
programme.desc: Now a successful businessman, a former military colonel is surprised in his home by a burglar whom he recognises. The colonel decides to find out why his old acquaintance was forced to turn to crime.

programme.title: Don't Ever Leave Me
programme.desc: Jack's grandfather Harry comes out of prison and stays with him in his mews flat.

programme.title: JAG: Fighting Words
programme.desc: A general’s comments about Islam during a church service pit Harm and Mac against each other as a court-martial hearing examines whether those remarks were a danger to national security.

programme.title: JAG: One Big Boat
programme.desc: When a Naval Academy sailing team gets caught in a squall and a team member drowns, Mac and Turner must determine if their driven commander willingly put his crew at risk.

programme.title: JAG: Death At The Mosque
programme.desc: Vukovic is sent to Iraq to defend a Marine who was caught on tape killing a seemingly innocent Iraqi civilian.

programme.title: JAG: Dream Team
programme.desc: A sailor dies during a fight aboard a ship at sea; Bud discovers the explanation. Mattie wakes up and talks. The general announces a reorganization, orders, and a promotion.

programme.title: JAG: Pilot, Part 1 & 2
programme.desc: A woman radar-intercept officer (RIO) disappears at night from an aircraft carrier in the Adriatic Sea. Two JAG lawyers, Lt. Harm Rabb and Lt. Caitlin Pike, investigate and solve. Harm, a former Naval aviator, unexpectedly becomes a hero.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: Team One is alerted to a situation in a bank where a woman who appears under duress is withdrawing all her money. When she sabotages her own rescue and escapes with her tormentor, the team turn their attention to her family, who is also in danger.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: As Donna gets ready to walk down the aisle, things changed drastically. She learns some surprising news regarding a mentor she once worked with.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: Team One must figure out how to get a Chinatown gang to release a local shop owner, then they also have to figure out how to get the one who shot the owner's daughter free as well.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: An ex-cop with a grudge against Greg Parker takes him hostage and threatens to drop him off an arena's megatron if Greg can't talk him down. Meanwhile his team discovers that they are helpless to use tactical options to save their boss.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: When Spike answers Sam's sister's desperate plea for help, he is forced, at gunpoint, to help two criminals steal evidence from the fortress that is the Metro Evidence Depot.

programme.title: Coming Through the Rye: Coming Through the Rye
programme.desc: In 1969, the Holden Caulfield-obsessed Jamie Schwartz runs away from boarding school to find the reclusive author J.D. Salinger. Inspired by actual events, Jamie's search becomes a journey of sexual awakening, love and loss.

programme.title: One Last Dance
programme.desc: In the wake of tragedy, a renowned NY dance company is on the brink of collapse. After leaving the dance world for good, Travis, Chrissa and Max have one last chance to re-connect with the passion and prove that miracles really can happen.

programme.title: Percy Vs Goliath
programme.desc: Based on the true story of Saskatchewan farmer Percy Schmeiser’s battle against Monsanto after their GMOs interfere with his crops. Starring Christopher Walken.

programme.title: One Step Beyond: Blood Flower
programme.desc: Professor Carroll is a political theorist who nonetheless has a neutral stance when it comes to radical involvement. He becomes strangely political after sniffing a rare Latin American flower.

programme.title: One Step Beyond: The Sorcerer
programme.desc: In World War One German officer Reitliger enlists the help of Karnak, a man with supposed psychic powers, to find out how his girlfriend Elsa is faring back in Germany. Seeing a vision of her infidelity he gets Karnak to will him back home.

programme.title: One Step Beyond: The Villa
programme.desc: A group of Britons are holidaying at an Italian villa where young medical student Tony Hudson hypnotizes his friend's wife,Mary Low. Whilst in a trance,Mary becomes hysterical,claiming that she can sense a young woman trapped in a lift.

programme.title: One Step Beyond: Midnight
programme.desc: While walking across a fog-covered London Bridge one night,a struggling writer falls in love with a beautiful woman he meets there. However,she isn't quite what she seems to be,and he stands a good chance of succumbing--literally--to her charms.

programme.title: One Step Beyond: The Tiger
programme.desc: Miss Cartwright is hired to be the new governess to young Pamela. Cartwright immediately dismisses Pamela's beloved nanny, Mrs. Murphy, and finds a punishment room for the child in the basement.

programme.title: One Step Beyond: Nightmare
programme.desc: A troubled painter is obsessed with painting a young lady he's never met before. He determines to find her in real life before the obsession drives him crazy.

programme.title: One Step Beyond: Eyewitness
programme.desc: In 1883, a Boston newspaperman writes a detailed eyewitness account of a natural disaster -- a full day before it happens. Working in his office late one night, Henry Soames finds his concentration rocked by four momentous explosions.

programme.title: One Step Beyond: The Bride Possessed
programme.desc: Matt Conroy is startled when on their honeymoon his wide-eyed, Louisiana-drawling wife Sally suddenly becomes a determined and demanding woman with no accent who denies even knowing him.

programme.title: One Step Beyond: Night of April 14th
programme.desc: A young Englishwoman is suddenly wracked by dreams of drowning in the ocean. She is stunned when her fiancée tells her that he has prepared a surprise honeymoon trip for them--they're sailing to New York on the passenger liner Titanic.

programme.title: Pluto TV 80’s Horror
programme.desc: Slashers, synths, and supernatural scares—Pluto TV 80’s Horror brings you the blood-soaked glory days of fright. From cult classics to VHS gems, relive the decade that made horror iconic. Big hair, bigger screams!

programme.title: The Amazing Transparent Man

programme.title: Monster Squad: Queen Bee

programme.title: Monster Squad: Mr. Mephisto
programme.desc: Confusion abounds when Mr. Mephisto replaces Mayor Goldwyn with a lookalike doll who spouts off radical opinions.

programme.title: Monster Squad: The Tickler
programme.desc: The Tickler passes off counterfeit bills in an attempt to lure the Monster Squad into a trap.

programme.title: Monster Squad: The Ringmaster
programme.desc: The Ringmaster holds children hostage as part of a larger scheme to buy out and close down all of the toy stores in America.

programme.title: Monster Squad
programme.desc: Frank and Dracula sign up for music lessons in an attempt to foil the mad musicians who robbed a telethon.

programme.title: Monster Squad: No Face
programme.desc: Mayor Goldwyn gives the deed to the city to Chief Running Nose, and then he declares all crime legal. Before long, the Monster Squad discovers No Face has been masquerading as both of them.

programme.title: Monster Squad: The Astrologer
programme.desc: During a newscast, The Astrologer announces that an earthquake is about to devastate the land, and to ensure his prediction comes true, he makes plans to detonate an atomic bomb.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-O (Original)
programme.desc: Five-O intercepts a box man, an expert safe cracker, at the Honolulu airport. The criminal is killed by a shot from Dan Williams, who fired just before the criminal would have shot Chin Ho.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-O (Original)
programme.desc: Apparitions of an ancient goddess of the volcano, avant-garde underground movies, and a concerned nephew and his wife all tie together in the apparent efforts of someone trying to do away with an old man in order to gain control of his valuable land.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-O (Original)
programme.desc: In the opening installment, a U.S. intelligent agent, friend of McGarrett's, turns up dead on a Honolulu beach. McGarrett, knowing the man didn't swim, decides to investigate the death as a homicide.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-O (Original)
programme.desc: Steve McGarrett is the head of a special investigator unit of the Hawaii State Government. In this two-part episode, McGarrett probes the death of a close friend, only to discover that the man did not drown as was commonly believed.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-O (Original)
programme.desc: Five-O is confronted with the problem of corralling foreign agents responsible for critically wounding a U.S. government undercover agent upon his return from a 10-year mission in Red China.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: While working at the Challenger Club, MacGyver finds he must save the local gang kids from Minton, the local gun supplier, who is planning to kill all the gang members as well as letting Brian Jefferies take the wrap for a murder he did not commit.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: MacGyver fights to save a housing project after tenants have been forced out of their homes by corrupt money-hungry landlords.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: MacGyver and his old friend Jack Dalton discover that inhabitants in a mountain valley live to be over 150 years old. Unfortunately, they also discover that it is the secret site of a heavy water plant used for nuclear weapon technology.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: When MacGyver becomes intertwined in a scheme to stop Chinese slave labor, he discovers that he has a son, Sam, who is also interested in bringing the fall of the man behind it all.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: MacGyver is a modern-day American hero with the uncanny ability to resolve a crisis in an extremely limited amount of time.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Louie is worried his blind girlfriend will no longer love him if an operation to restore her sight is successful.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: To what lengths will boyfriend Arnie go to win over Elaine's kids? Elaine is in for a surprise when she invites him over to meet her children.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The cabbies come to the rescue when Jim tries to convince his family that he didn't squander his inheritance by buying a run-down restaurant.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Latka worries that Simka's wacky behavior might cost her the right to remain permanently in America.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The cabbies embark on a frantic race against time when they team up in a wild nonstop drive from New York to Miami so that Alex can see his long-lost daughter on her twenty-minute layover at the airport in the premiere episode of Taxi.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Alex’s romantic instincts are triggered by the sexy voice at the answering service. Her alluring manner prompts him to arrange a dinner date that turns into a big surprise on Taxi.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: A pretty girl has John in a whirl, and his determination to meet her prompts the taxi gang to come up with a surefire line that would unfreeze any woman on earth in Taxi.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Elaine fears the worst when the cabbies invite themselves to her party for her highbrow art world friends who have no clue that she moonlights as a cab driver.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The high-spirited taxi gang helps a jittery Bobby fight potential disappointment when he decides that he will end his stage career if he doesn’t get an acting job before midnight.

programme.title: 100 Years of Horror

programme.title: 100 Years of Horror

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime: Winston's Secret
programme.desc: In April 1996, Winston Malcolm is rescued from icy waters of a lake after a canoe accident. He announced to hospital staff that his wife was with him. A dive team is called to the rescue, and the body of Jan Marshall is finally found a few days later.

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime: The Mystery of Disembodied Feet
programme.desc: The summer of 2007, a young girl walks on the beach and a human foot in a sneaker. Less than a week later, a couple discovers another running shoe with a foot inside of it south of there. Thus begins the mystery of the disembodied feet.

programme.desc: Andromeda is tasked with escorting medical ships safely through Drago-Kazov space.

programme.title: Andromeda

programme.desc: Claire is about to achieve her dream, and wants Tess to have hers - that little cafe in Brunswick she used to talk about.

programme.title: McLeod's Daughters: The Italian Stallion
programme.desc: When Alberto, a good looking itinerant Italian, rescues Jodi from a rampant steer she falls hopelessly in love with him.

programme.title: McLeod's Daughters: Lover Come Back
programme.desc: When Tess finds an old psychology textbook, she becomes obsessed with "the three levels of why": as in, "Why doesn't Alex bring me flowers?" and "Why are Jodi and Becky at each other's throats?"

programme.title: McLeod's Daughters: Friends Like These
programme.desc: Drovers Run is big, but is it big enough to handle two new city slickers? Tess is delighted when Simon and Briony, two old friends, show up for an unexpected visit.

programme.title: McLeod's Daughters: The Drover's Connection
programme.desc: Alex teases Tess about her new venture, a hemp crop, as Meg serves up another in a recent succession of gourmet meals. Meanwhile Becky gets a visit from her brother Sean.

programme.title: McLeod's Daughters: Through The Looking Glass
programme.desc: An abandoned baby causes problems for Alex and Tess, and rabbits decimate the Drovers Run garden. Peter and Claire agree their relationship needs to stay strictly professional.

programme.title: Wild At Heart

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 2
programme.desc: Danny returns to South Africa with Caroline, Liv and Charlotte. They are all excited to be back and are looking forward to seeing their new home, Clearwater Farm.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 3
programme.desc: Danny has been preparing his pitch for an Endangered Species Project. JLW, a pharmaceutical company, are looking to fund an environmental project and the family hope that this grant money will enable them to buy Leopard's Den and Mara.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 4
programme.desc: Danny and Ed release two cheetah brothers together, a symbol of their new partnership, but not all of the family are happy about this new start. Caroline is still furious at what she sees as Danny's betrayal of Du Plessis.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 5

programme.title: Sliders

programme.title: Sliders
programme.desc: After saving a human woman and her child from the child's Kromagg father, the Sliders discover the child cannot survive on Earth.

programme.title: Sliders

programme.title: Sliders
programme.desc: Maggie's (Kari Wuhrer) double leaves her stranded on a militarized world, where she is united with her dead husband's double (guest star John DeMita).

programme.title: Sliders

programme.desc: This special episode shines a light on criminals who have been brought to justice for one crime only to be released to commit further terrible acts.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: The London Nail Bombings

programme.title: Moesha: Girl’s Night In

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: When Stuart’s favorite restaurant is about to close, he takes Phil along for one last meal, only to bump into Phil’s ex-wife who is now engaged. Holly is baffled by mixed signals from a cute co-worker. Haskell starts an online traffic school.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Holly (Kristen Johnston), determined to find Stuart (David Alan Basche) a date, introduces him to a woman who turns out to be a true professional. Haskell (Wayne Knight) invents a fabulous online lifestyle for himself in order to one-up his ex-wife.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Phil (Donald Faison) meets a foreign lingerie model who doesn’t speak English and Stuart (David Alan Basche) has to act as interpreter. Eden helps Holly overcome a bad first impression with a handsome neighbor. Haskell buys a coffin as an investment.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Phil (Donald Faison), Stuart (David Alan Basche), and Haskell (Wayne Knight) are forced to trade apartments with Holly (Kristen Johnston) when her mother (Judith Light) comes for a visit because Holly never told her mother her engagement ended months ago.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: When Holly (Kristen Johnston) has to face her cheating ex fiancé for the first time since they broke up, she enlists the guys' help to prove to him he lost the best thing he ever had.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Phil (Donald Faison) is nervous when Holly (Kristen Johnston) starts dating his top client – basketball player Kevin Tyler (Amar'e Stoudemire). Haskell (Wayne Knight) lures Stuart (David Alan Basche) into the world of sports betting.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: The gang's relationships are thrown out of whack when Holly discovers there's way more to Stuart than meets the eye.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: When the guys can't resolve their differences, Holly sends the three of them to couples' therapy, where they discover that Holly is the problem.

programme.title: The Exes

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Holly tries to get to the bottom of a big secret between Eden and her boss. Stuart is about to be reunited with his beloved dog – until Phil loses him.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Phil’s quest to land a new client puts the boys in a strip club, and Stuart in the hospital. Holly’s new “magic bra” works wonders.

programme.title: Conmen Case Files: Gene Morrison – Fraudulent Forensics Expert

programme.desc: Women who kill husbands, lovers, rivals and parents will shock society. But a very special horror is reserved for women who will kill their own.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Judi Buenoano secretly murdered lovers to claim on insurance policies whilst nurse Genene Jones secretly killed at least 46 infants left in her care between 1980 and 1982.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Sometimes, when a man and a woman unite, a terrible urge for destruction can awaken in them both. Happy couples become deadly teams, intent on one goal: murder.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Love Gone Wrong
programme.desc: Love can be beautiful, love can be blind and love can be deadly. Desire and jealousy are powerful forces driving women to dark and horrifying places in their minds.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Deadly Obsession
programme.desc: Power is a responsibility as well as a privilege. But in the wrong hands, power can corrupt. For former Deputy Attorney General for the State of Delaware, losing sight of his sworn oath to uphold justice could prove lethal.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Backstage Murder
programme.desc: In the 1980's, two partners created a nightclub that would bring them wealth and international fame. The male strip club phenomenon promised female patrons fun and excitement. But the bright lights hid a dark side.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Lost Boys
programme.desc: In June of 1997, a crime wave swept Iowa like a tornado. It left a trail of robbery, kidnapping, and murder in its wake, and then it moved on. No one knew where.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Millionaire Murder
programme.desc: A businessman went to Florida to make one last deal before he retired-he never returned home to his millions. Authorities examined who was closest to him and who stood to gain from his disappearance. But this time conventional rules didn't apply.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Cat and Mouse
programme.desc: He was a predator, abducting girls and young women from their own front yards in broad daylight. He was a sadist: phoning one victim's family, taunting them, boosting then dashing their hope, and he wouldn't stop until we stopped him.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: He Said Give Your Baby Away and You Did
programme.desc: Shannan claims Tim fathered her child. He doesn't buy it because he doesn't recall having sex with her! Later, Ayana is furious that her boyfriend Patrick denies their son!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Steve, I Can't Face The Truth.
programme.desc: Today Danny is finally ready to face the missing man in his life and get answers to lifelong questions. Steven offers a number of excuses for not seeing his son, but can we redeem himself?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Do I Have a Child With a Gay Man?
programme.desc: Are Tracy and Latonia's men leading secret double lives with other men? What will the lie detector test results reveal about Kanecha and Mike?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: 16-Year-Old Surrogate Stole Our Baby
programme.desc: Sarah was Dawn and Derek's surrogate, but took off while five months pregnant. Sarah claims that they took advantage of her. Who are the baby's rightful parents?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: You Failed Five Times?
programme.desc: Michelle's current boyfriend Everett can't run from Robert's allegations about his daughter. Will Everett's lie detector test results prove his innocence?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Bullied Out of School
programme.desc: Aabrea and Jerae bullied a high school girl so badly that she dropped out. Can Steve help them resolve their differences and figure out why so many teens turn to bullying?

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: Sir Arthur Conan Doyle's famous detective faces the ultimate challenge when enormous monsters attack London.

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes: The Case of the Unlucky Gambler
programme.desc: A young boy shows up at Baker Street, asking for Holmes' help in finding his missing father.

programme.title: The Adventures Of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: A woman mistakenly has her ball switched for a real croquet ball that kills a Parliament member.

programme.title: The Adventures Of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: A school boy vandalizes church steps with faculty names, that are then later found dead.

programme.title: The Adventures Of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: Watson claims that he was hit in the eye by Albert Higgins a half hour after he had watched him die.

programme.title: The Adventures Of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: 'Escape artist' Crocker, escapes from the police to ask Holmes to clear him from a murder charge.

programme.title: The Adventures Of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: Brian O'Casey explains his story of the sweepstakes ticket, and the urgency to find the lost ticket.

programme.title: The New Detectives: False Witness
programme.desc: When a murder is committed and deceit clouds the evidence, investigators turn to science and technology to uncover the truth and expose a murderous lie and capture the killer.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Tainted Blood
programme.desc: The forces of nature can reduce a body to bones in a matter of weeks. Using a unique combination of art and science, forensic anthropologists give victims a face long after they have been forgotten.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Shattered Vows
programme.desc: A woman is found dead at the bottom of the basement stairs. As detectives look into the accident, they begin to question the sequence of events.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Out To Kill
programme.desc: An abandoned car outside Philadelphia brings heartbreak to a family and terror to a community. A young woman is dead, the killer gone. But the marks of his passage remain.

programme.title: The New Detectives: In The Camera's Eye
programme.desc: Photography has long been a vital tool in homicide investigations. A single image captures enough information to identify a suspect, and to preserve a vital clue long after a witness' memory fades.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: In the US, chefs compete against one another. Gordon Ramsay hosts the intense cooking competition where the winner will be given the chance to be a head chef, but first must prove themselves.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: Fifteen vie for the position of executive chef at Gordon Ramsay's new restaurant, scheduled to open in the summer of 2008; Gordon gets physically sick from a contestant's concoction; one contestant goes missing.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: Each team must accurately slice a halibut into six-ounce fillets; one member of each team must work as the maitre d' while the others staff the kitchen; one chef is eliminated.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The contestants are made to catch hens in their living room to prepare for a family-style chicken dinner service.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: On family night, the team that makes the most fresh pasta for that night's dinner service wins a day of fun at the Santa Monica Pier. An accident sends one contestant to the hospital.

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: The Anita Cobby Murder
programme.desc: In February 1986, nurse Anita Cobby, a former entrant in the Miss Australia quest, is walking home from Blacktown station in Sydney's outer-western suburbs. A Holden sedan pulls up and Anita is dragged into the vehicle.

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: A Killer Amongst Us: The Norfolk Island Murder
programme.desc: On Easter Sunday 2002, on sleepy Norfolk Island in the south west Pacific, the body of 29-year-old Janelle Patton was found lying in an open field.

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: The Gonzales Family Murders
programme.desc: On July 10, 2001, Sef Gonzales murdered his sister Clodine, 18, mother Mary Loiva Josephine, 43, and his father Teddy, 46, in their North Ryde home.

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: Snowtown: Bodies in the Barrels
programme.desc: In 1999, eight bodies are found in six barrels filled with acid in a former bank vault in rural Snowtown, 50 kilometres north of Adelaide.

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: The Butchered Boys
programme.desc: This episode revisits Adelaide's notorious Adelaide Family Murders case, where six young Adelaide men were murdered during the 1970s and '80s. The victims were found in random locations throughout the state, their bodies neatly cut into pieces.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Up on the Roof
programme.desc: Today, Dog and the family are back in Colorado and are about to make one of their most exciting captures ever. When the adrenaline-fueled arrest goes down, every family member will play a critical role.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Family Business
programme.desc: Dog and the Chapman clan start their hunt today with another well-established bail bonding family. As Dog's fame has grown, so have his responsibilities.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Felons Interrupted
programme.desc: Dog is confronted with two alleged felons in crisis. Family and friends of these bondees are convinced that they are getting into further trouble while awaiting trial, so Dog and the posse have to bring these men back to jail.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Let It Snow
programme.desc: Christopher is barely 21, already has a history of domestic abuse and assault, and is facing major time in a room without a view. This hunt won't be easy for Dog - the leads are few, informers and family are not forthcoming.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Rush from Judgment
programme.desc: Facing hard time for forging checks, Melissa pulled a vanishing act at her sentencing hearing, bolting from the courthouse in broad daylight. Lucky for her bondsman, Dog and his posse are in Colorado and ready to help.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Burn & Return
programme.desc: Dog is busy. First, he's after a fugitive who is allegedly an expert in the game of "burn and return"- shoplifting goods to return them for cash refunds. But he's not easy to track.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Stormy Weather
programme.desc: Going after two fugitives in one day is tough enough without the facing Colorado's notoriously unpredictable weather. Today, it's the threat of severe thunderstorms, hail and area wide tornado warnings.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: One for the Money
programme.desc: It hurts Dog to see people who after years of walking the straight and narrow, suddenly lose their way. But today's case is a member of the law enforcement community who has recently gone astray, and that truly troubles the Dog.

programme.title: Run's House: Jo Jo's Graduation
programme.desc: It's summer time at the Simmons House. Rev has just purchased a BMW for Jojo's graduation. Diggy and Russy remind Run that they have made the honor roll at school and wonder if they will get a gift too.

programme.title: Run's House: Growing Up Is Hard To Do
programme.desc: Believing Diggy's fly wardrobe may have something to do with girls being interested in him, Russy raids Diggy's closet. Hearing the boys argue over clothes, Justine decides to get Russy some clothes of his own.

programme.title: Run's House: Run's Manner House
programme.desc: Rev and Justine are both fed up with the boys' rude behavior. Justine decides to bring in a supernanny type person to teach the family the basics in social etiquette.

programme.title: Run's House: When Diggy Met Brittney
programme.desc: When Rev learns that Diggy's play date is actually with two girls he believes that Diggy must have a crush on one of them. He's hoping it's Ja Rule's daughter because they must be rich.

programme.title: Run's House: Rapper's Retreat
programme.desc: Rev receives guest passes to the Mohegan Sun in Connecticut. Justine doesn't want to go. Rev is proud of Jojo's recent recordings with Blackout and wants to reward him as a fellow rapper.

programme.title: Run's House: Camp Rev
programme.desc: Since Rev can't remember the last time Diggy and Russy had a sleepover, he requests that they invite their friends over for an unforgettable sleepover that Rev dubs "Camp Rev."

programme.title: Run's House: Who's Your Daddy?
programme.desc: While putting together her latest insert of Angela's Rundown, Angela discovers she has way too much content to fit into one sixteen-page insert. She and her crew at work discuss a full magazine.

programme.title: NEW Half & Half: The Big Falling For It Episode
programme.desc: After Mona accidentally hurts Dee Dee in a self-defense class, Dee Dee lies about her injury so Mona will continue to hang out with her

programme.title: NEW Half & Half: The Big Sexy Shame Episode
programme.desc: When Mona starts dating a model named Jamal, she realizes that they have great physical chemistry but she is embarrassed to have him meet her friends and family because he is not the brightest

programme.title: NEW Half & Half: The Big "I Have A Dream" Episode
programme.desc: Mona becomes antsy about her friendship with Spencer after she has a romantic dream about him. Meanwhile, Dee Dee -- who thinks the dream was about a woman -- introduces Mona to a lesbian friend of hers.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Argonaut & Patches
programme.desc: A family is afraid of being bit by their aggressive English bulldog/Lab mix. Cesar prescribes pack therapy. A Cocker Spaniel has a life-threatening appetite for paper products.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Shadow Dogs
programme.desc: Search and rescue dogs are more play than work and must get their mission back on track. A couple expecting a baby needs help with curbing their misunderstood rescue’s biting.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Jake & King

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Riley & Sophie, Aussie and Lulu, Bebe, & Sasha
programme.desc: A couple of adopted basset hounds have a bad case of sibling rivalry. A dingo mix from Australia hasn't adjusted to her new life in California. An overly protective poodle.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Bad Dogs of Comedy
programme.desc: A pet groomer gets rave reviews but needs Cesar's help with handling some difficult clients. Chihuahua Peanut is only 10 pounds but makes a good bit of noise, causing chaos with her cohabiters.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.71
programme.desc: Woman accuses ex-husband of assaulting her with binoculars after accusing him of cheating on Mother’s Day. Boy accused of hitting child with rock; child’s mother sues ex-live-in boyfriend for cost of fixing daughter’s broken teeth.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.109
programme.desc: While away in rehab, a woman claims her ex-husband neglected to pay rent and utilities and broke her bike/A man sues the mother of his child for overpayment of child support; she says he should consider it the back support that he never paid.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.119
programme.desc: Custody of a pit bull rescued from the pound is disputed by a man and his daughter; he says she abandoned the dog at his home/A woman sues her former friend for the cost of bailing her out of jail after she was arrested for false imprisonment.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.84
programme.desc: A contract between cousins to ‘share’ a Pontiac Grand Am ends with a fight over the return of the car with allegedly ‘missing’ speakers/A fight over a three-way gym membership leaves a young woman at odds with her ex-boyfriend and his best friend.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.42
programme.desc: A 10-year-old boy allegedly shoots up his neighbor’s shed and trailer with a BB gun/A woman is sued for stopping payment on a cell phone she bought on eBay; she claims the phone only worked in Canada and that she was ripped off.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.102
programme.desc: A luau-themed birthday party incites a group assault between two sisters and other partygoers; organizers claims the sisters were not originally invited to the party.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.103
programme.desc: Threats to kill kittens, questionable remarks about a man’s sexuality and inappropriate, drunken toasts after the death of a child come into play when ex-friends fight over alleged vandalism.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.189
programme.desc: A handgun comes between a brother and sister who sue over the alleged destruction of property during a heated fight. Accusing his mother of losing his rightful inheritance, a man denies owing her for unpaid loans and car insurance payments.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.211
programme.desc: Convicted of first-degree assault after an altercation at a bar, a man is sued by his ex-girlfriend who bailed him out of jail. An alleged assault between former college dorm mates, a cycle of harassment, and a damaged computer are disputed.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.137
programme.desc: Alleged assault, vandalism, and marijuana use are the source of contention between a woman and her nephew’s ex-girlfriend.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.249
programme.desc: A woman sues her son for eviction fees and stopping payment on an apartment. A teen's father breaks his son's phone used for alleged drug purchases, leaving the other teen's father with the bill.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Two Wigs, A Gun, and A Murder: Part 2
programme.desc: Fred Jablin, a devoted father was gunned down in his driveway. His ex-wife, Piper was the prime suspect. Circumstantial evidence, including an airline ticket and two wigs indicated that Piper had masqueraded as her older sister and killed her husband.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Millionaire Boys Club
programme.desc: 48 Hours is television's most popular true-crime series, investigating shocking cases and compelling real-life dramas with journalistic integrity and cutting-edge style.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Accused
programme.desc: In 1996 the car which Sheila Bryan was driving with her mother as passenger accidentally veered off the road and into a ditch killing her mother. Sheila was charged with murder -- then tried, convicted, and sentenced to life imprisonment.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Killer App
programme.desc: The dangers of anonymous chat apps; a father discovers his 15-year-old daughter planning to run away with a 30-year-old man she met online; a teenage girl is found stabbed to death after making friends online.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Negotiators
programme.desc: An inside look at 23-year-old Jarrett Jordan, a disturbed man who shot three people and barricaded himself in a house in Queens, NY. He had with him his four-month-old daughter and three hostages.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Eleven Hundred Miles to Murder
programme.desc: Authorities first suspect the husband in the savage murder of a Florida doctor, but when he has an alibi, they follow a tip on a 1,100 mile trip that takes the case in an unexpected direction.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Sweet Charity
programme.desc: The fraudulent international activities of Gerald and Catherine Hagar, professional fund raisers for charity, take the IMF to an estate on the French-Italian border.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Council pt. 1
programme.desc: Jim Phelps leads the IMF on an assignment to destroy the syndicate, a criminal empire headed by Frank Wayne.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Council pt. 2
programme.desc: The IMF continues its fight against organized crime.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Astrologer
programme.desc: The IMF accepts a critical mission to rescue Nikolai Kurzon, the leader-in-exile of the Baltic state of Veyska who has been kidnapped by Col. Stahl (Steve Ihnat), head of the secret police.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Echo of Yesterday
programme.desc: The resurgence of neo-Nazism in Germany takes the IMF to Bavaria, where Marcus von Frank (Hans Gudegast) threatens to become a second Hitler.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Wild West
programme.desc: Allen and Ton explain their strategies at a storage auction in San Bernardino, win two units, then have a Pepperbox gun and vintage Lionel train set appraised by experts.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Ramped Up
programme.desc: Ton and Allen go head-to-head with their former assistant, Carolyn, while Ton battles a bad back. The guys discover an automatic BB gun and, when negotiations to sell a stunt ramp go south, Allen faces a tough decision.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Sin City Shootout
programme.desc: 1953 Chevy-inspired bumper car; scores of M16 30-round magazines; reproduction 1940s boardwalk photobooth; aerosol-powered spud gun potato launchers.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Wreck-Shaw
programme.desc: Allen drags a starving Ton to a weekend auction and some newbie buyers try to eat up all the profit. Will a rickshaw, a wrecking ball, and blast detonators be enough to satisfy Ton's appetite, or will the guys go home hungry?

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Early Bird Special
programme.desc: Vintage Shooting Star carnival game; professional Mixed Martial Arts octagon fighting cage.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Trading Places
