programme.title: On the Case: Gone in an Instant
programme.desc: In Lenexa, Kansas, young women disappear from their apartments as police piece together evidence showing the terrifying crimes are connected.

programme.title: On the Case: Mystery In The Desert
programme.desc: When an innocent couple is murdered execution style in the Arizona desert it marks the beginning of a 50 year search for the truth. Who really killed them and why? After decades of investigation the controversial case remains shrouded in mystery

programme.title: On the Case: Spreadsheet of Terror
programme.desc: When the body of a teenage girl is found in the Columbia River, police wonder if she was the victim of an accident or suicide. But the evidence reveals it was the beginning of disturbing murder.

programme.title: On the Case: Circled by Vultures
programme.desc: A tourist takes a photo of vultures in Joshua Tree National Park and inadvertently discovers a gruesome homicide.

programme.title: On the Case: Field of Nightmares
programme.desc: A young mother and son are found shot to death in a quiet Texas field. Would a mysterious bag left at the crime scene hold the key to catching their killer?

programme.title: On the Case: In Broad Daylight
programme.desc: A young mother is murdered in broad daylight with her toddler just a few feet away. Police have little to go on except the bizarre description eyewitnesses have given them of the brazen killer.

programme.title: Sliders
programme.desc: While the others get jobs, Rembrandt dives into a sci-fi book that bears more than a resemblance to their lives. When the Sliders track down the author, they learn he came from Quinn and Colin's home world.

programme.title: Sliders
programme.desc: When Colin and Quinn disappear during a slide, Maggie and Rembrandt (Kari Wuhrer, Cleavant Derricks) meet a new Mallory (Robert Floyd) who holds the key to what happened to the two brothers.

programme.title: Sliders
programme.desc: The Sliders land on a college campus where Diana's (Tembi Locke) alternate appears, a distressed version of herself; Mallory (Robert Floyd) experiences violent flashbacks from Quinn's life.

programme.title: Sliders
programme.desc: After landing in a world which looks like Purgatory, the Sliders find a war raging between earthlings and Kromaggs and are recruited against their will to fight.

programme.title: Sliders
programme.desc: The weary Sliders are nursed back to health in a monastery run by a group of people who are recording civilization's achievements to help future generations.

programme.title: Sliders
programme.desc: After landing in a totalitarian world, Mallory (Robert Floyd) is paralyzed by a laser beam hit but later joins a commune of healers who alter him with a glittering liquid.

programme.title: Robbie Coltrane's Critical Evidence: The Perfect Murder: Roger& David Cooper
programme.desc: Robbie Coltrane examines the case of two brothers who murdered a marketing manager on Christmas Eve 2014 using chloroform.

programme.title: Robbie Coltrane's Critical Evidence: Into Thin Air: David Gilroy
programme.desc: It was a missing person’s case that shook the people of Scotland to their core. Within a week of Suzanne Pilley disappearing from her place of work in Edinburgh, police were convinced they were hunting for a killer - despite not having found a body.

programme.title: Robbie Coltrane's Critical Evidence: The Double Axe Murderer: Dennis Smalley
programme.desc: A double axe murderer and no clues - except tiny flakes of paint discovered deep in the wounds of one of the victims. This is a story of how forensic science - and the determination of one detective - found the killer.

programme.title: Killer Britain: Levi Bellfield
programme.desc: For years police suspected Levi Bellfield of crimes including sexual assault, GBH and abduction, but there was never enough evidence to charge him. Then they began connecting him with the murders of young blonde women.

programme.title: Killer Britain: Peter Morgan
programme.desc: Millionaire Peter Morgan moved a young mother, Georgina Symonds, into one of his properties, paying her thousands a month to be his ‘girlfriend’. But when the relationship turned sour, he began plotting his revenge.

programme.title: Moesha: Grandpoppa Don’t Take No Mess
programme.desc: Moesha tries to get sympathy from her visiting grandfather over having to go to a new school.

programme.title: Moesha: Labor Day Jammy
programme.desc: Mo’s new school’s annual fund-raiser conflicts with Crenshaw High’s final summer blowout “Freaknik”, and Frank and Dee insist Mo should attend the fund-raiser.

programme.title: Moesha: Day One
programme.desc: Mo attends the first day at her new school and is miserable. She has only made one friend and feels out of place.

programme.title: Moesha: Age Ain’t Nothing
programme.desc: Hakeem begins to date an older woman he meets at his store.

programme.title: Moesha: My Mom’s Not An Ottoman
programme.desc: Dee wins a free decorating consultation at Mo’s school raffle and can’t wait to redo the house.

programme.title: Moesha: The Play Scene
programme.desc: Mo writes a scene from a play set in a Blues Lounge in the 1940s for her English class, and our cast acts it out for us.

programme.title: Moesha: Use Me Once – Shame On You – Use Me Twice I’ll Kill Ya
programme.desc: Mo tells her friends at the Den that Hayley’s dad is an important record executive.

programme.title: Moesha: Keepin’ It Real
programme.desc: Mo is attracted to a classmate she is working with on a project.

programme.title: Moesha: Halloween Part 1 – Kim’s Revenge
programme.desc: Mo, Kim and Niecy decide to dress as “The Women of Batman” for Halloween.

programme.title: Moesha: Break It Down
programme.desc: Frank takes Hakeem to the father/son “lock-in” at the local church, to encourage open communication and trust between fathers and sons.

programme.title: Moesha: Rhythm Dues
programme.desc: Mo encourages CPQ to submit their latest song to the local radio station for their “play it or stuff it” segment. When the song is played, it is well received. Q has written lyrics over a Morris Day song, and Morris shows up at “The Hole” where he plays.

programme.title: Are We There Yet?: The Suzanne's Surprise Party Episode
programme.desc: Nick secretly plans a surprise for Suzanne to help her overcome a traumatic childhood experience.

programme.title: Are We There Yet?: The Mother's Day Episode
programme.desc: Suzanne and Marilyn convene for a spa weekend for Mother's Day, but friction soon mounts between the two.

programme.title: Are We There Yet?: The Lindsey Goes Vegan Episode
programme.desc: Lindsey decides to take on a vegan diet and lifestyle, but she may have ulterior motives in doing so.

programme.title: Are We There Yet?: The Staycation Episode
programme.desc: Nick tries to give his family the best vacation ever but things do not go well at all.

programme.title: Are We There Yet?: The Thief Episode
programme.desc: Lindsey steals sixty dollars from Gigi's wallet and turns back around and blames Kevin for it.

programme.title: Are We There Yet?: The Bad Dream Episode
programme.desc: Kevin and Nick goes to an R-rated movie, but Kevin has nightmares from seeing it.

programme.title: Are We There Yet?: The 22 Episode
programme.desc: The family oversleeps on the day Lindsey is scheduled to sing the national anthem at a baseball game. Meanwhile, Kevin gets sick.

programme.title: Are We There Yet?: The Cooking Episode
programme.desc: Nick and Suzanne go head to head in the kitchen when Nick says cooking is \\"easy\\" and Suzanne challenges him to a family cooking competition.

programme.title: Are We There Yet?: The Regift Episode
programme.desc: Suzanne tries to return an unlikely gift from Marilyin with Nick not knowing.

programme.title: Are We There Yet?: The Kevin Gets a Commercial Episode
programme.desc: Kevin's burgeoning career as a child actor has a negative fallout when a potential big break goes to his head. Ted Lange guest stars.

programme.title: Are We There Yet?: The Suzanne's Surprise Party Episode
programme.desc: Nick secretly plans a surprise for Suzanne to help her overcome a traumatic childhood experience.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Céline Marchand Case
programme.desc: On May 30th 2015 in Sorinières, Yann Machand reports his wife Céline Marchand missing.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: The Key to the Enigma (Farid Ouzzane Case)
programme.desc: On July 13, 2011, two boaters retrieved a suitcase that was floating in the bay of Lorient. Inside, they discovered the tied up corpse of a man. In order to identify this unknown man, whose face was unrecognizable.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: A Strange Deadly Robbery: The Isabelle Mosser Case
programme.desc: On September 12, 2013, Eric Mosser, a 45-year-old heating engineer, discovers his wife Isabelle lying in a pool of blood at their home in Illfurth, Alsace.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: A Fatal Student Night (Ste´phane Kameugne Case)
programme.desc: On December 24, 2008, the body of Stéphane Kameugne was fished out from a canal in Châlons-en-Champagne. The young man had been missing for two weeks and no one had seen him since the evening of his graduation ceremony from his engineering school

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: A Strange Hanging - Chantal Ternik Case
programme.desc: On April 3th 2003, Chantal Ternik, a 48 year old housewife, is discovered hanged in her house of Sanary-sur-Mer, in Var.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Eyes of Toklamanee
programme.desc: Sydney and her student Adam are onto his ancestors' fabled Eyes of Toklamanee, but they are pursued by mysterious gunmen.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Run Sydney Run
programme.desc: Sydney and Nigel are ambushed in Russia. Two weeks later, Sydney wakes up in the house of a man called Tsarlov, who claims to have saved her.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: M.I.A.
programme.desc: Sydney gets kidnapped, but by whom? Nigel, Claudia and Cate will have to go through the list of enemies Sydney has made in the past and deduce which of them is responsible. Cue flashbacks.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Don't Go Into the Woods
programme.desc: Sydney's friend phones to inform her that he's discovered information on the Golden Hawk of Maribor, lost since 1711. Sydney and Nigel travel to Lubjanka to meet him, but he's already gone.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: French Connection
programme.desc: While on a lecture tour with Nigel in Europe, Sydney is contacted by MI5 because she is the only one who can prevent an impending high-level assassination.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Midnight Flight
programme.desc: Germania, ca. 400 AD: an artifact called Gunther's Scepter is sealed in a vault. Kleine Burgh, 2001: Sydney and Nigel are hired to find it using a crystal and a stone tablet.

programme.title: Have I Got a Bit More News for You
programme.desc: Team captains Ian Hislop and Paul Merton are joined by guest host David Tennant and panellists Angela Rayner MP and Joe Wilkinson.

programme.title: Have I Got a Bit More News for You
programme.desc: Team captains Paul Merton and Ian Hislop are joined by a variety of guest hosts and panellists from the worlds of comedy, journalism and current affairs for an extended compilation that looks back at the big news of 2017.

programme.desc: Team captains Ian Hislop and Paul Merton are joined by guest host Stephen Mangan and panellists Steph McGovern and Jo Caulfield.

programme.title: Have I Got a Bit More News for You

programme.desc: A man denies popping the tires and smashing the truck windows of his ex-girlfriend’s new boyfriend’s vehicle in a jealous rampage. Ex-lovers accuse each other of having drug problems during a fight over an alleged loan for a motorcycle.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.195

programme.desc: A woman's Disneyland trip after a concussion weakens her lost wages claim. Another woman discovers her fiancé's hidden child while he's incarcerated, leading to property disputes.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.75

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.244
programme.desc: A woman sues the father of her two daughters for half of his tax return. Another woman's son is killed in a hit-and-run by a drunk driver, dividing former friends over a loan made from the insurance settlement.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Strange Life of Dr. Schwartz
programme.desc: The investigation into the murder of a beloved Florida doctor reveals his dark, secret past.

programme.title: Arthur: Kids Are From Earth, Parents Are From Pluto/Nerves Of Steal
programme.desc: It’s Lakewood Elementary Parents Open House! How will the kids survive a whole evening of their parents' embarrassing antics? Buster is the only kid in Elwood City who doesn't have a Cybertoy, so he decides to 'borrow' one from the store.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends

programme.desc: Po wants some Tubby Custard, but she doesn' t have time to eat is before watching some children do some painting in the garden. The Tubbies are very careful not to spill their Tubby Custard, but if they do, the Noo Noo will tidy up.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch two children take their dog for a walk. A voice trumpet appears and barks like a dog. Dipsy, Laa-Laa and Po laugh as they run all over Teletubbyland barking.

programme.title: Teletubbies

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies pop up to say hello before they gather round to watch some children learn about the number nine. Po and Tinky Winky count nine flowers that appear in Teletubbyland and then run off to fin Dipsy and Laa-Laa and dance the Bump dance.

programme.title: Teletubbies

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch some children play with balls of different shapes and sizes. In Teletubbyland, something happens to Dipsy's hat.

programme.title: Teletubbies

programme.title: Teletubbies

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Its early morning and there’s a strange creature in Sunflower Valley. First of all it visits the Homestead and then Scarecrow Cottage scaring Sumsy and Travis. It’s something big and hairy, but gets frightened away by Scrambler carrying Baz.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob is rendering a wall for Mr Sabatini. The job is straightforward, but the finished result looks rather plain, so Bob offers to get some tiles from JJ’s yard to decorate it. While Bob is gone, Mr Sabatini demonstrates his soccer skills to Dizzy.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob and crew are demolishing an old barn for Farmer Pickles, but as Lofty tests his demolition ball he accidentally damages one of the pillars at the entrance to Bob’s yard. Wendy offers to stay and repair this while Bob gets on with the day’s job.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob’s built a new waterwheel for the old watermill. He’s made it at the yard, but now needs to dismantle it to take it to the mill in sections. Bob needs Benny, Scoop, Lofty and Muck to carry the wheel sections through the marshland to the mill.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob is installing a new pizza oven for Mr Sabatini, while Wendy lays a cycle lane in town. Mr Bentley has brought some Stop/Go signs to hold up the traffic while she works, but there is no-one to operate these with him – except Spud!

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Whilst Spud is collecting some eggs for breakfast, he spots the large amount of straw delivered the previous day and overhears Bob and Farmer Pickles having a conversation. They discuss how they are making “something new out of straw”.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Mr and Mrs Bentley are moving house, and Bob is carrying out a loft conversion at their new home. Mr Bentley greets Bob and his team, then leaves for work. The removal company call to say that they have several staff off with flu.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Mr and Mrs Sabatini have asked Bob to convert a local house into a delicatessen. Unfortunately for Roley, there is no rolling to be done. The gang leaves to get on with the job and Roley decides to tag along just in case.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob is making a through-lounge at the Bentleys’, while Wendy goes to JJ’s yard with Lofty and Dizzy to collect a steel joist and other materials. Lofty is nervous about carrying the joist, but Dizzy and Trix race off with the bricks and mortar.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob is repairing a leaking water tank at the school, when he discovers bats in the belfry. He tapes up the tank temporarily, but says the bats will need a new home as they are a protected species.

programme.title: Knights of Can-A-Lot
programme.desc: Bob, Wendy and the team get a big surprise when Bob's father Robert comes to visit. When stern Ms Chalmers from the National Heritage asks Bob to renovate the old castle a case of mistaken identity leaves Bob’s father in charge!

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: There is great excitement at Bob’s yard when his new metal detector is delivered. He plans to use it to find a burst pipe in Farmer Pickles’ field, and promises Muck that afterwards they will hunt for buried treasure.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Farmer Pickles is having problems with mice eating his barley seed so he asks Bob to build a seed store to keep it safe. Whilst Bob is working, Farmer Pickles decides to go and buy some replacement seed.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: It’s a big day. The team are building Farmer Pickles new factory which will turn sunflowers into sunflower oil. Everyone is excited to meet Marjorie, who arrives by bicycle. Marjorie has been brought on board by Farmer Pickles to manage the factory.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob and the gang are building a pedestrian crossing. Mrs Percival, meanwhile, has asked Molly to paint a mural of a jungle scene in the school playground.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob and the team are building a special flat-packed eco-home for Marjorie. When Muck and Benny spot Marjorie’s canvas tent and Spud’s straw-house, they wonder what else houses can be made from.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Pam Goody is running out of money to complete the Arts Centre renovations and Molly suggests holding a fashion show to raise funds. Pam thinks this a wonderful idea and asks Molly to organise it. Bob is, of course, just the man to build a catwalk.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: On the third leg of their road trip Charles Hanson visits the solicitors and Charlie Ross finds history in an old packet of cigarettes.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina
programme.desc: This episode includes: Undesirable Desiree, Bermuda Triangle, Arlington Murder, Update: Hotel Balcony Death and Rainy Day.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina
programme.desc: This episode includes: Chameleon, Crime Novelist, Lourdes and Death Row Defender.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina
programme.desc: This episode includes: Poison Pen, Champ, Li'l Miss + UD, Motorcyclist's Samaritan and Update: Shroud of Turin.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries
programme.desc: This episode includes: Pix of the Dead, Johnny Lee Wilson (Pts. 1 & 2 + UD) and Totally Exhausted.

programme.title: Area 51, Roswell Crash, Alien Abductions
programme.desc: Area 51 is located at the center of UFO research and legends of extra-terrestrial folklore. It is located six hundred miles west of Roswell, New Mexico, where the infamous Roswell UFO crashed in 1947. Also in this episode The Allagash Alien Abductions .

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries
programme.desc: This episode includes: Moss Beach Ghosts, Civil War Ghosts, She Sold Babies & UD, UD: Pierre's Amnesia and Bus Stop Amnesia & UD.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: A Unexpected Haunted Adventure
programme.desc: The team heads to Lydiate Abbey to investigate claims of a ghostly white lady and stumble upon a totally hidden gem deep in the woods, which has its own spirits haunting.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Spirits Flying High at Speke Aerodrome
programme.desc: The team head to Speke Airport to investigate claims that some of the aircraft located there have ghostly passengers still aboard, waiting to take flight.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Bump In The Bingo Hall
programme.desc: The team head out to Blackpool for a day out at the seaside that they will never forget. Investigating one of Blackpool's iconic buildings The Empire Bingo Hall. Many famous acts have played here and it seems that some may have never left.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension
programme.desc: Hidden in St Helens, is a museum that is home to demonic and dark entities trapped inside of vehicles.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Jack The Ripper
programme.desc: Bex and Sean head to Sefton and investigate a police station connected to the murderous Jack The Ripper. Was James Maybrick really the Ripper? Did his wife poison him?

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Lost for Words
programme.desc: Spirited teenager Jayne Furlong dreamed of becoming a child psychologist - instead, she ended up a prostitute. In 1993, 17 year old Jayne vanished from her patch on Auckland's Karangahape Road.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Girl in The Ditch
programme.desc: When 12 year old Agnes Ali'iva'a drowned in a ditch in 1992, the police initially thought her death was accidental. It was four years before public and political pressure forced police to re-investigate her death.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Where's Grandad?
programme.desc: 65-year-old Alan Gordon Woodford of Bedford St. Mossburn left his home on foot Saturday morning April 20, 1985 and was never seen or heard of again.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: In Too Deep
programme.desc: In 1999, Kiwi engineer Aaron Hopa and his English colleague Robert Glazzard were murdered on board a survey ship in the Persian Gulf in.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: When The Trail Goes Cold
programme.desc: This episodes involves the disappearance of 62-year-old Kaye Stewart, a woman who went missing while on a short walk on June 13th, 2005.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Fallen Angel
programme.desc: In this episode of Sensing Murder we learn about the murder of Angela Blackmoore, a 21 year old woman with a 2 year old child. The child was not harmed and the killer has not been found.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Ghost Friends Forever
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS is called to Little Rock, Arkansas where a family has inherited a bungalow, next door to their home, that they believe to be cursed.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Vintage Spirits
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS is called to Liberty, Missouri to investigate the Belvoir Winery.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Hoover Damned
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS travels to Boulder City, Nevada to investigate Boulder City Hospital.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Something in the Water
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS is called to Excelsior Springs, Missouri to investigate The Elms Resort & Spa.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Undying Love
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS travels to Monticello, Arkansas to investigate a mansion with a dark history involving an ill-fated and secret love story that ended with a woman committing suicide.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: The Coroner's Case
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS is called to Shreveport, Louisiana where the employees and owner of the Rendall Building are experiencing terrifying paranormal activity.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Dwelling of the Dead
programme.desc: A single mom claims she is being physically assaulted by a spirit in her Kentucky home. Ryan first explores a natural explanation for the alleged phenomena. But the client's five-year-old son also sees spirits, and his sightings appear to line up.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Name
programme.desc: Ryan Buell and company set out on one of their most dangerous cases to date - to help a single mother who is experiencing paranormal activity in a home that was once the site of brutal murder.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Woman in the Window
programme.desc: Ryan and his team lend paranormal assistance to a family who lives in a historic home that was once a part of the Underground Railroad. Does the answer to their haunting lie in the mysterious tunnels beneath the house?

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Fire
programme.desc: Christina has been experiencing paranormal activity ever since her father and step-mother were murdered near Columbus, OH last year. PRS and psychic/medium?Chip Coffey delve into a open murder case and wind up exposing a family divide.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Firehouse
programme.desc: Everyone from the chief to the trainees at the Clementon Fire Department is convinced that the ghost of a former member is haunting their firehouse.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Spirits of the Slave Dungeon
programme.desc: Ryan books a two-night case in a real haunted jail in Charleston, SC, but PRS soon realizes the spirits themselves are being held there against their will and subjected to an unjust form of torture.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Satan's Soldier
programme.desc: Mark and Kim can't sleep through the racket caused by unseen forces in their central Indiana home. When PRS and Psychic/Medium Michelle Belanger discover what appears to be blood in the basement, they investigate a history of violence in the home.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Get Out of This House
programme.desc: When an aggressive spirit stalks a young family, PRS is called in to investigate. When it is determined that the source of the haunting may have been unknowingly invited in, Ryan races to identify and hopefully defeat the entity before it's too late.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Devil in Jersey
programme.desc: PRS delves deep into the pine barrens of the Garden State to separate myth from reality about the so-called "Jersey Devil." Accompanied by a cryptozoologist the team interviews eye witnesses and experts in search of the truth.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Return of the Dead: Glove II
programme.desc: PRS returns to the site of one of their most famous cases, Daisytown, PA, where they had discovered a glove print of an old miner that they determined was the spirit of a Great-Grandfather.

programme.title: NEW & EXCLUSIVE! MOST HAUNTED
programme.desc: The last part sees the team reach their limits as the spirits of this enormous location continue to emerge from the shadows. But will the enormity of the paranormal activity prove too much for the world-famous team.

programme.title: NEW & EXCLUSIVE! MOST HAUNTED
programme.desc: A haunted house, a haunted school and a haunted auction hall, all in one location, Bishton Hall. With stories of poltergeist activity, ghostly figures, strange voices and a dark entity, what will the Most Haunted team uncover tonight

programme.title: NEW & EXCLUSIVE! MOST HAUNTED
programme.desc: With the night getting ever more active and poltergeist activity growing, something seems to target one of the team. And what activity could make Glen state ‘’that is paranormal’’.

programme.title: NEW & EXCLUSIVE! MOST HAUNTED
programme.desc: Tired from this long investigation, the team continue where one of them realises that the idea to investigate along was a mistake, but can the others get there in time. And something has a final message for the team as they leave.

programme.title: A Haunting: The Haunted Cabinet
programme.desc: After James Hilton and his girlfriend Sandy bring an antique cabinet into their home, they capture actual video evidence proving it’s haunted. Sandy fears the entity from the cabinet is taking James over and turns to paranormal investigators for aid.

programme.title: A Haunting: The Diabolical
programme.desc: A session with a Ouija board transforms Marie’s home into a portal for the diabolical.

programme.title: A Haunting: Hidden Terror
programme.desc: After Mike and Lisa move in their new house, Lisa’s personality begins to change dramatically.

programme.title: A Haunting: Haunted Victorian
programme.desc: After moving in their dream home, Edwin Gonzalez and Lillian Otero begin to experience strange occurrences; mysterious footsteps and unexplained noises. Lillian is physically attacked while sleeping and the couple tries to escape, but is it too late?

programme.title: A Haunting: Haunted Past
